researches.title: Backend-agnostik veri katmani: MSW gomulu mock API + ortak HTTP client + mock-to-real kopru

currentState.finding: packages/core'da uretim kalitesinde createApiClient mevcut (retry/exponential-backoff/timeout/AbortSignal birlestirme/401 onUnauthorized callback) ama uygulamalarda fan_in=0; hicbir apps/ kodu tuketmiyor.
currentState.evidence: packages/core/src/api/client.ts:35 createApiClient; grep 'createApiClient' apps/ -> sifir kullanim (yalnizca packages/core/src/index.ts:15 ve api/index.ts:2 re-export). client.ts:6 zaten '@MX:TODO: No test file' tasiyor.

currentState.finding: Sample feature kendi izole in-memory mock'unu kullaniyor; core client'i bypass ediyor. mockItems modul-seviyesi mutable dizi; createSampleItem push ile mutate ediyor.
currentState.evidence: apps/web/src/features/sample/api.ts:34 'let mockItems'; :66 'mockItems.push(newItem)'; :55-56 mevcut '@MX:WARN' bu state sizintisini ve gercek API'ye gecişte yaratacagi maskeleme riskini zaten isaretliyor. delay(500/300/400) sabit gecikmeler kodda gomulu.

currentState.finding: Auth session katmani ham fetch kullaniyor; core client'in retry/timeout/error-mapping mantigini tekrar etmeden cigniyor (duplicate transport).

Mobil'de hicbir api.ts/hooks.ts yok (find sonucu bos).

currentState.finding: MSW projede tamamen yok; mock dizini yok.

currentState.finding: QueryClient global default'lari sabit (staleTime 60s, retry 1); ADR-005'in veri-tipine-gore staleTime tablosu (Bolum 45) ile uyumsuz, merkezi query-options factory yok.

currentState.finding: E2E auth-flow testleri yalnizca sayfa render'i dogruluyor; gercek login/network akisi test edilmiyor cunku mock backend yok.

currentState.finding: eslint-plugin-bp'de veri-erisim kurali yok; 'raw fetch component icinde' veya 'core client zorunlu' gibi ADR-005 hukumlerini enforce eden lint kurali bulunmuyor.
currentState.evidence: packages/eslint-plugin-bp/src/rules/ altindaki 19 kuralin tamami UI/design-token odakli (no-hardcoded-color, no-raw-pressable, require-design-token vb.); data-access lint yok.

referenceImplementations.pattern: Fetch-first HTTP client factory: config (baseURL/timeout/headers/onUnauthorized) -> {get,post,put,patch,delete}; idempotent metotlarda exponential backoff retry, AbortSignal.timeout + AbortSignal.any birlesimi, ApiError sinifi ile status+data tasima.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Yeni veri katmaninin transport temeli zaten burada ve platform-agnostik (fetch native). Web session.ts ve sample api.ts'i bu client uzerine tasimak ADR-005 'raw fetch dagilmaz' hukmunu karsilar; sifirdan client yazmaya gerek yok, sadece wire etme + test ekleme.

referenceImplementations.pattern: TanStack Query hooks deseni: useQuery/useMutation + queryKey sabiti + onSuccess'te invalidateQueries + analytics.track entegrasyonu.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Mock-to-real gecişte hooks katmani DEGISMEDEN kalmali; sadece altindaki queryFn (api.ts) implementasyonu degisir. Bu, 'altin sablon' olarak hem web hem mobil feature'lar icin kopyalanabilir.

referenceImplementations.pattern: Cookie-preferred session boundary: checkSession() {status,userId} return-shape contract + 401/diger mapping + network-hatasi=expired (recoverable) deseni.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: MSW /api/auth/* handler'lari bu return-shape contract'ina gore fixture uretmeli; auth mock'u bu invariant'i bozmamali. checkSession boundary'si mock-to-real gecişte sabit kalan sozlesme.

referenceImplementations.pattern: Zod schema + z.infer ile form/veri tipi turetme.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: MSW handler request body validation ve response contract dogrulamasi ayni Zod schema'lardan beslenebilir; tek kaynak tip + runtime validation. Mock fixture'lar schema-uyumlu uretilebilir.

referenceImplementations.pattern: @project/core barrel export + workspace:* tuketim modeli (apps her ikisi de @project/core'a baglanmis).
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Ortak data-access contract (tipler + fetch fonksiyonlari + query-key factory + staleTime sabitleri) packages/core'a tasinirsa web ve mobil ayni sozlesmeyi paylasir; mobil duplicate SampleItem'i ortadan kalkar.

externalPatterns.approach: MSW v2 — paylasilan handlers.ts tek kaynak; browser icin setupWorker (msw/browser), Vitest/Node icin setupServer (msw/node), Playwright icin @mswjs/playwright. http.get/post + HttpResponse.json + delay() ile loading/401/500/gecikme fixture'lari.
externalPatterns.source: context7 /mswjs/mswjs.io (816+ snippet, High reputation); 'src/mocks/handlers.ts single source of truth, imported by both Node and browser setups' dogrulandi
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: network-seviyesi interception (kod degismez, gercek fetch akisi calisir), web+test+storybook tek handler seti, gercek API'ye gecişte sadece worker'i kapatmak yeterli. Eksi: tarayicida public/mockServiceWorker.js service worker dosyasi gerekir (vite public/), RN'de service worker/XHR interception NATIVE calismaz -> mobil icin ayri strateji sart. Bu projeye uygunluk: YUKSEK (web+vitest+playwright+storybook hepsi MSW destekli, ADR-005 behavior parity ile uyumlu).

externalPatterns.approach: Mobil (React Native/Expo) icin MSW alternatifi: (a) msw/native deneysel destek + react-native-url-polyfill, VEYA (b) ayni handlers contract'ini paylasip mobil'de fetch interceptor/fake transport (core client'a injectable fetch) kullanmak.
externalPatterns.source: context7 MSW docs (browser/node odakli; native interception sinirlamasi); apps/mobile @tanstack/react-query catalog mevcut
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti(a): tek handler seti web+mobil. Eksi(a): RN'de MSW olgun degil, Metro/Hermes ile XHR interception kirilgan, Expo SDK 55 ile dogrulama gerekir. Arti(b): core createApiClient'a fetch-impl injection eklenirse mobil deterministik mock alir, MSW bagimliligi olmaz. Eksi(b): handler contract'i iki yerde implemente edilebilir riski. Bu projeye uygunluk: ORTA — onerilen melez: web/test MSW, mobil core-client fetch-injection ama AYNI fixture data modulunu (packages/core/mocks/fixtures) paylas.

externalPatterns.approach: Mock-to-real kopru: tek env bayragi (VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled) ile worker.start() kosullu; baseURL VITE_API_BASE_URL'den; vite dev proxy ile /api -> gercek backend.
externalPatterns.source: MSW resmi 'Conditionally enable mocking' deseni + Vite server.proxy dokumantasyonu
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: dev'de mock, staging/prod'da gercek backend tek degisken degisimiyle; CI test her zaman MSW (deterministik). Eksi: env-yonetimi disiplini gerekir (.env.example guncellenmeli). Bu projeye uygunluk: YUKSEK — VITE_API_BASE_URL zaten tanimli ama olu; bu desen onu canlandirir.

externalPatterns.approach: Query-options factory + ADR-005 staleTime tablosu: merkezi queryKeys + queryOptions factory (packages/core veya features/_shared) — her feature buradan okur.
externalPatterns.source: ADR-005 Bolum 44-45 (prefetch + canonical staleTime/gcTime tablosu), TanStack Query v5 queryOptions API
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: stale/gc tutarliligi, query-sprawl onleme (ADR-005 Risk 37.1), cross-platform paylasim. Eksi: erken soyutlama riski (tek feature varken). Bu projeye uygunluk: ORTA-YUKSEK — sample tek feature ama boilerplate amaci 'turetilen projeler' icin altyapi, factory deseni mantikli.

branches.branch: B1 — Ortak HTTP client'i canlandir ve tek transport noktasi yap
tasks: packages/core createApiClient icin test dosyasi yaz (client.ts:6 @MX:TODO'yu kapat): retry/backoff/timeout/abort/401-callback/5xx-vs-4xx davranislari
apps/web/src/auth/session.ts ham fetch'lerini core client uzerine tasi (onUnauthorized callback ile 401 mapping merkezilesir, return-shape contract korunur)
apps/web sample api.ts'i core client.get/post cagrilarina cevir (in-memory mockItems kaldirilir, /api/sample endpoint'lerine baglanir)
core client'a baseURL'i env'den (VITE_API_BASE_URL / mobil icin EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL) okuyan app-level factory ekle (apps/web/src/api/client.ts singleton)
branches.rationale: createApiClient zaten uretim kalitesinde ama fan_in=0; iki ayri ham fetch noktasi (session.ts ve sample api.ts) ADR-005 'raw fetch component'lere dagilmaz' hukmunu cigniyor. Tek transport noktasi olusturmak duplicate retry/timeout/error-mapping mantigini ortadan kaldirir ve mock-to-real gecişte tek degisim noktasi saglar.

branches.branch: B2 — MSW gomulu mock backend (web + test + storybook)
tasks: msw catalog'a ekle (pnpm-workspace.yaml), public/mockServiceWorker.js generate et (npx msw init)
Paylasilan handlers: /api/auth/me, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/register + sample CRUD (GET liste, GET :id, POST, PUT, DELETE) — http.get/post + HttpResponse.json + delay()
Fixture'lar: basari, bos liste, 401 (auth boundary), 500 (retry tetikleme), gecikmeli (loading state) senaryolari; mevcut INITIAL_ITEMS verisini fixture'a tasi
Browser setup: src/mocks/browser.ts setupWorker; kosullu start (VITE_API_MOCKING bayragi) main.tsx'te
Test setup: src/mocks/server.ts setupServer; vitest setup.ts'e beforeAll/afterEach/afterAll lifecycle ekle; Playwright icin @mswjs/playwright degerlendir
branches.rationale: Backend olmadan gercek veri akisina karsi gelistirmenin tek dogru yolu network-seviyesi interception; in-memory mock kod degisikligi gerektirir ve gercek fetch akisini test etmez. context7 dogruladi: tek handlers.ts hem browser hem node setup tarafindan import edilir, bu da web/test/storybook tutarliligini garanti eder. 401/500/loading fixture'lari error-empty-loading state'lerini (ADR-005 Bolum 19-21) gercekci test edilebilir kilar.

branches.branch: B3 — Vite dev proxy + mock-to-real env kopru
tasks: vite.config.ts'e server.proxy ekle: '/api' -> VITE_API_BASE_URL (mock kapaliyken gercek backend)
Env semasi: .env.example'a VITE_API_BASE_URL + VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled/disabled ekle; vite-env.d.ts'e ImportMetaEnv tip tanimlari
Karar matrisi belgele: dev+mock / dev+real / test(MSW zorunlu) / prod(real) kombinasyonlari
main.tsx'te worker.start() yalnizca VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled iken (onUnhandledRequest:'bypass')
branches.rationale: VITE_API_BASE_URL tanimli ama kodda olu; mock-to-real gecisin tek-degisken-disiplini olmadan prod'a mock sizma riski var. Vite proxy + env bayragi, ayni feature kodunun dev'de mock, staging/prod'da gercek backend ile calismasini saglar; CI testleri ise her zaman deterministik MSW kullanir.

branches.branch: B4 — Cross-platform contract paylasimi (packages/core)
tasks: SampleItem tipini ve sample data-access contract'ini packages/core'a tasi (mobil duplicate interface kaldirilir)
Query-key factory + ADR-005 staleTime tablosu sabitlerini packages/core'a koy; web+mobil hooks buradan okur
Mobil sample ListScreen/DetailScreen'i useSampleItems/useSampleItem hook'larina bagla (inline mockItems kaldir, onClick->onPress ayrimi UI temasiyla koordine)
Mobil mock stratejisi: core client'a injectable fetch ile fixture modulunu (packages/core/mocks/fixtures) paylas; MSW-native opsiyonunu Expo SDK 55'te POC ile dogrula
branches.rationale: GERCEK cross-platform karari geregi mobil web contract'ini paylasmali; su an mobil duplicate SampleItem + inline mock tasiyor ve DetailScreen tamamen hardcoded. Veri sozlesmesini packages/core'a tasimak ADR-005 behavior-parity (Bolum 30) hukmunu karsilar ve tek tip-kaynagi saglar. RN'de MSW olgun olmadigindan fixture verisi paylasilir ama transport platforma gore farklilasir.

branches.branch: B5 — Enforcement + DoD
tasks: eslint-plugin-bp'ye yeni kural: 'no-raw-fetch-in-component' (feature/screen icinde dogrudan fetch yasak, data-access katmani zorunlu) — ADR-005 Bolum 11/32 enforce
CI'da MSW handler'larin contract-test'i: handler response'lari Zod schema'ya uyumlu mu
Coverage: yeni veri katmani icin esik (core client + handlers + hooks)
DoD: mutation sonrasi correctness kaniti (ADR-005 Bolum 38.7), 401/500/loading senaryolarinin test kapsami
branches.rationale: ADR-005 hukumleri enforcement olmadan zamanla erozyona ugrar (su an eslint-plugin-bp'de hicbir data-access kurali yok ve tum kurallar 'warn'). Lint kurali + contract-test + coverage esigi, 'raw fetch geri donmesin' ve 'handler-response Zod-uyumlu kalsin' invariant'larini otomatik korur.

ubiquitous: The system SHALL route all HTTP data access through the shared createApiClient in packages/core (no raw fetch in feature/screen components), per ADR-005 Bolum 11/32.
The system SHALL define API mock behavior in a single shared handlers module that serves as the source of truth for browser, test, and Storybook environments.
The system SHALL expose data-access contracts (types, query-key factory, fetch functions) from packages/core so web and mobile consume an identical contract.
event: WHEN the development server starts with VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled, the system SHALL register the MSW service worker and intercept /api/* requests with fixture responses.
WHEN a sample CRUD or auth request is issued in tests, the system SHALL intercept it via setupServer so tests run deterministically without a live backend.
WHEN a mutation completes successfully, the system SHALL invalidate the affected query keys so dependent views reflect the change (ADR-005 Bolum 16).
state: WHILE VITE_API_MOCKING is disabled, the system SHALL forward /api/* requests through the Vite dev proxy to VITE_API_BASE_URL (real backend).
WHILE the MSW worker is active, the system SHALL apply configured delay/error/401 fixtures to exercise loading, error, and unauthenticated UI states.
optional: WHERE the platform is React Native (Expo), the system SHALL provide mock responses via core-client fetch injection sharing the same fixture data module, since native service-worker interception is not reliably supported.
WHERE a 401 response is received, the system SHALL invoke the onUnauthorized callback so session state maps to 'unauthenticated' per the checkSession boundary contract.
constraint: IF a request uses a non-idempotent method (POST), THEN the system SHALL NOT auto-retry it (preserve createApiClient RETRYABLE_METHODS invariant).
IF MSW intercepts a request, THEN the response SHALL conform to the corresponding Zod schema / data-access contract shape.

IF the mock layer is replaced by a real backend, THEN no consumer hook (useSampleItems/useSampleItem/useCreateSampleItem) or session boundary SHALL require changes (only the queryFn/transport binding changes).

risks.risk: In-memory mockItems mutasyonu gercek API'ye gecişte sunucu-tarafi persistence bug'larini maskeler (mevcut @MX:WARN bunu zaten isaretliyor).
risks.mitigation: MSW handler'larini stateful degil deterministik fixture-tabanli yap; mutation sonrasi state'i handler-scope'ta tut, her test afterEach'te resetHandlers ile sifirla. resetSampleItems gibi modul-state mutasyonunu kaldir.

risks.risk: MSW React Native'de native interception destegi olgun degil (service worker/XHR); mobil sessizce mock'lanmadan gercek network'e dusebilir.
risks.mitigation: Mobil icin core-client'a injectable fetch deseni; ayni packages/core/mocks/fixtures verisini paylas. MSW-native opsiyonunu Expo SDK 55'te ayri POC ile dogrula, riskli ise B4'ten cikar.

risks.risk: Env bayragi disiplini bozulursa prod build'e mock worker sizar (guvenlik/dogruluk riski).
risks.mitigation: worker.start() yalnizca import.meta.env.DEV && VITE_API_MOCKING==='enabled' kosulunda; production tree-shake icin dynamic import; CI build'de bayrak asla enabled olmamali; eslint/test ile dogrula.

risks.risk: Cross-platform contract paylasimi (B4) packages/core'a UI/transport kaciragi getirebilir (21-repo-structure-spec ve auth/types.ts:2 'auth provider SDK YASAK' kurali).
risks.mitigation: packages/core'a yalnizca platform-agnostik tip + fetch fonksiyon + query-key/staleTime sabitlerini tasi; setupWorker/setupServer (platform-spesifik) apps icinde kalsin. boundary-check skill ile import yonunu dogrula.

risks.risk: Query-options factory + staleTime tablosu erken soyutlama; tek sample feature varken over-engineering (TRUST Readable / Constitution Rule 4).
risks.mitigation: Once minimal: sadece sample + auth query-key'leri. staleTime tablosunu sabit modul olarak ekle ama factory soyutlamasini ikinci feature gelince genislet.

risks.risk: Storybook ve Playwright MSW entegrasyonu ek setup yuku; uc ortam (browser/test/storybook) handler lifecycle drift edebilir.
risks.mitigation: Tek handlers.ts, her ortam kendi setup'inda import etsin; msw-storybook-addon ve @mswjs/playwright resmi binding'leri kullan; CI'da uc ortamin da ayni handler hash'ini tukettigini dogrula.

dependencies: AUTH temasi: session.ts/useAuth.ts wire-edilmesi ve route guard'lar — /api/auth/* MSW handler'lari auth akisinin uctan uca test edilmesini saglar; bu tema auth wiring ile sira/contract baglantili (checkSession return-shape invariant).

CROSS-PLATFORM UI temasi: mobil sample ekranlarinin hooks'a baglanmasi (B4) onClick->onPress ve packages/ui RN-tasima calismasina bagimli; veri katmani contract'i hazir olsa da mobil ekran portu UI temasini bekler.
ADR-005 (data-fetching-cache-mutation) ve ADR-010 (auth/cookie-preferred) — bu tema bu iki ADR'nin canonical hukumlerini implemente eder; ADR degisikligi gerektirmez ama hizali kalmali.
TEST/QUALITY temasi: vitest setup, coverage esigi, e2e gercek-akis testleri — MSW olmadan auth-flow e2e'leri yuzeysel kaliyor; bu tema testlerin derinlesmesini saglar.
ENV/CONFIG: .env.example ve vite-env.d.ts guncellemeleri — VITE_API_BASE_URL/VITE_API_MOCKING semasi DEPLOY temasiyla (deploy.yml env injection) koordine edilmeli.

referenceImplementations.pattern: Logout teardown sozlesmesi: best-effort server logout + queryClient.clear() + state reset finally blogu (wrong-user leak onleme)

referenceImplementations.pattern: Merkezi fetch client + onUnauthorized callback kancasi (401 -> auth aksiyonu)
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Auth adaptoru bu client'i kullanmali; onUnauthorized -> useAuth.logout()/refresh tetikleyici olarak baglanmali. ADR-010 bolum 46 token refresh queue pattern'i bu callback uzerine kurulabilir. Tek HTTP giris noktasi oldugu icin auth header/cookie politikasi tek yerde uygulanir.

referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Mobil auth wiring'inde bu iki adapter'in ustune mobil useAuth + auth store kurulmali. ADR-010'un 'token sadece SecureStore' kurali ve biometric!=session kurali bu dosyalarda zaten kodlanmis; tekrar yazilmamali, sadece tuketilmeli.

externalPatterns.approach: Kendi backend'i (BFF) + HttpOnly cookie (mevcut /api/auth/* sozlesmesi) — adapter'in default/canonical implementasyonu
externalPatterns.source: ADR-010 bolum 8.1-8.2 (backend-managed secure cookie, HttpOnly+Secure+SameSite); session.ts mevcut /api/auth/me+/logout
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: ADR-010 canonical tercihi, XSS token-theft yuzeyi minimum, frontend token'a hic dokunmuyor. EKSI: backend gerektirir (charter 'backend benim isim degil' ile gerilim) — ama bu boilerplate zaten 'kendi backend'ini getir' varsayiyor. Vite SPA icin dev'de /api proxy (vite.config server.proxy) + prod'da reverse-proxy gerekir. CSRF ayrica dusunulmeli (ADR-010 8.4). BU PROJE ICIN EN UYGUN default cunku mevcut kod zaten bu sekle gore yazilmis.

externalPatterns.approach: Supabase Auth (@supabase/supabase-js + @supabase/ssr) ince wrapper
externalPatterns.source: context7 /supabase/supabase: createBrowserClient/createServerClient, signInWithPassword, auth.getClaims, middleware updateSession
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: tam BaaS (DB+auth tek yerde), hizli time-to-product, signInWithPassword/signUp hazir. EKSI: @supabase/ssr cookie modeli NEXT.JS server-component/middleware varsayiyor; bu proje Vite SPA — createBrowserClient varsayilan olarak token'i localStorage'a yazar, bu ADR-010 8.1 HttpOnly tercihi ve bolum 13 localStorage yasagi ile CELISIR. Cozum: Supabase'i developer BFF arkasinda calistirip cookie'ye cevirmek (ek katman) VEYA ADR-010 web-fallback (bolum 9) token modelini bilincli kabul etmek. RED GEREKCESI default olarak: SPA'da SSR cookie deseni dogrudan uygulanamaz, localStorage token ADR ihlali.

externalPatterns.approach: Clerk (@clerk/clerk-react) ince wrapper
externalPatterns.source: context7 /clerk/clerk-docs: ClerkProvider, useAuth/useUser, SignIn/SignUp prebuilt component, session token httpOnly cookie
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: Clerk session'i first-party httpOnly cookie ile yonetir (ADR-010 ile en uyumlu BaaS), prebuilt UI, MFA/passkey/social hazir (ADR-010 45-47 watchlist'lerini karsilar). EKSI: prebuilt UI mevcut @project/ui design-token formlarini bypass eder (require-design-token/require-form-hook ile gerilim); vendor lock-in; ucretlendirme kullanici basina. Headless mode (useSignIn) ile kendi formlarini kullanmak mumkun ama daha fazla wiring. RED GEREKCESI fallback olarak: design-system disipliniyle gerilim, ama httpOnly uyumu en iyi.

externalPatterns.approach: Firebase Auth ince wrapper
externalPatterns.source: ADR-010 bolum 45.5/46 (Firebase Auth referans backend olarak aniliyor); moai-platform-auth skill
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: olgun, genis social provider, Google ekosistem. EKSI: Firebase Auth client SDK ID token'i IndexedDB/localStorage'da tutar (ADR-010 ile celisir); cookie modeli icin session-cookie endpoint'i (Firebase Admin SDK backend) gerektirir. Cross-platform RN tarafinda @react-native-firebase ek native config. Supabase ile ayni HttpOnly gerilimi.

externalPatterns.approach: Adapter pattern: AuthAdapter interface (login/logout/checkSession/refresh/onAuthStateChange) + provider-specific impl'ler
externalPatterns.source: ADR-010 bolum 5.1/7.2 (explicit auth boundary/adapter), 46.6 authService.loginWith(provider) abstraction; repo-structure-spec 21 'auth boundary and adapter: app shell/platform-aware controlled layer'
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: charter'in 'backend benim isim degil' durusunu KORUR — default adapter own-backend cookie, ama Supabase/Clerk/Firebase pluggable. UI sadece AuthSummary tuketir, provider degisimi UI'yi etkilemez. Cross-platform parity (web+mobil ayni interface). EKSI: yanlis tasarlanirsa asiri soyut olabilir (ADR-010 36.1 riski). Tek somut impl varken factory kurmaktan kacinmali (CLAUDE.md Enforce Simplicity). DEGERLENDIRME: bu temanin kalbi; interface'i @project/core'a, impl'leri app-shell katmanina koy.

ubiquitous: The system SHALL expose auth state to the UI only as a sanitized AuthSummary (status/userId/displayName), never raw tokens or session artefacts (ADR-010 bolum 6).

The system SHALL route all authentication operations (login/logout/checkSession/refresh) through a single AuthAdapter boundary; UI components SHALL NOT call provider SDKs directly (ADR-010 bolum 5.1/7).
The system SHALL provide a default own-backend HttpOnly-cookie AuthAdapter implementation as the canonical baseline (ADR-010 bolum 8).
The system SHALL clear the TanStack Query cache, reset auth state and reset navigation on every logout to prevent wrong-user data leak (ADR-010 bolum 16, L.1.5/L.1.7).
event: WHEN a user submits the login form with valid credentials the system SHALL invoke AuthAdapter.login, transition status to 'authenticated' on success, and redirect to the returnTo path or home.
WHEN a user submits the login form with invalid credentials the system SHALL display a sanitized, classified error message (ADR-010 bolum 20) and SHALL NOT expose raw backend error strings.
WHEN an authenticated user triggers logout the system SHALL call best-effort server logout, then deterministically clear cache/state/secure-storage and navigate to the login screen.
WHEN the app bootstraps the system SHALL run checkSession once and SHALL display a loading surface until auth status resolves to a terminal state (ADR-010 bolum 15).
WHEN any API response returns 401 the system SHALL invoke the onUnauthorized hook which SHALL attempt a single queued token refresh and, on failure, SHALL log the user out (ADR-010 bolum 46).
state: WHILE auth status is 'unauthenticated' or 'expired' the system SHALL redirect access to protected routes to the login screen.
WHILE auth status is 'authenticated' the system SHALL redirect access to public-only auth routes (login/register) to the home screen.
WHILE the session bootstrap (checkSession) is in progress the system SHALL render a loading screen instead of either the protected shell or the login screen.
optional: WHERE the selected AuthAdapter is Supabase or Clerk the system SHALL document the localStorage-vs-HttpOnly trade-off and SHALL require explicit acknowledgment of the ADR-010 web-fallback token model (bolum 9).
WHERE the platform is mobile the system SHALL persist tokens exclusively in Expo SecureStore and SHALL NEVER write tokens to MMKV/AsyncStorage (ADR-010 bolum 10/13).

WHERE biometric hardware is enrolled on mobile the system SHALL offer biometric token-unlock as an optional convenience layer that SHALL NOT replace backend session validation (ADR-010 bolum 29/44.6).
constraint: IF a network/offline error occurs during checkSession THEN the system SHALL return a recoverable 'expired' status (NOT 'unauthenticated') to avoid forcing a hard logout (mevcut session.ts:25-34 invariant, korunmali).
IF server logout fails (network/5xx) THEN the system SHALL still complete client teardown and SHALL NOT reject the logout promise (mevcut best-effort sozlesmesi).
IF a credential or token value would be sent to analytics/Sentry/logs THEN the system SHALL block it (ADR-010 bolum 24 privacy denylist).
IF a form contains 2+ inputs THEN the system SHALL enforce react-hook-form + Zod via the require-form-hook lint rule at 'error' severity or CI --max-warnings 0.

branches.branch: Yol karari: A (react-native-web kopru) vs B (RN-native primitive + .native/.web split) DERIN trade-off
branches.rationale: EN BUYUK mimari karar. Mevcut durum: ADR-007 zaten 'mobile=NativeWind' demis ama kod %100 web-only (12/12 primitive HTMLAttributes + DOM, 49/53 component raw DOM). NativeWind v5 (Tailwind 4 hizali, CSS-variable destekli) JUNE 2026'da HALA pre-release ve sadece Expo SDK 54 ile dogrulanmis, SDK 55 DEGIL (WebSearch + nativewind.dev/v5). Bu, ADR-007 Section 43 'stable readiness gate'inin KARSILANMADIGI anlamina gelir. Karar bu gercege gore verilmeli.
tasks: A yolu (react-native-web): packages/ui'yi RN primitive'leri (View/Text/Pressable/ScrollView) uzerine yaz, react-native-web ile web'e koprule. ARTI: tek kaynak, tek API, kod tekrari yok, 53 component + 12 primitive tek yerde. EKSI: web bundle'a react-native-web (~100KB+) girer, mevcut Tailwind 4 web stack'i ile react-native-web StyleSheet paradigmasi CAKISIR (ADR-007 web=Tailwind kararini bozar), Vite + react-native-web alias/babel-plugin-react-native-web kurulumu, web'de 28 mevcut sayfanin re-test'i

B yolu (.native.tsx/.web.tsx split): her primitive/component icin platform-specific implementasyon, paylasilan prop interface (.types.ts). ARTI: web Tailwind/CSS-variable + mobile NativeWind ayri ayri optimal (ADR-007'ye TAM uyum), bundle saf kalir, platform-idiomatic. EKSI: ~65 dosya x2 implementasyon bakim yuku, API drift riski, metro otomatik .native cozumlemesi + Vite icin manuel alias

KARAR ONERISI: HIBRIT-B agirlikli. Primitive katmaninda (12 adet) platform-split SART (View vs div, Pressable vs button fiziksel olarak farkli); component katmaninda (53 adet) cogu primitive kompozisyonu oldugu icin TEK dosya kalabilir (sadece 4/53 saf kompozisyon ama digerleri primitive'e indirgenince platform-agnostik olur). react-native-web'i SADECE web build alias'i olarak degil REDDET cunku Tailwind 4 web runtime karariyla cakisir

iki yolun bundle/metro/babel maliyetini somut olc: A = vite.config react-native-web alias + flow-strip + 100KB+ runtime; B = metro zaten .native cozer, Vite icin sadece extension resolution + NativeWind v4/v5 babel preset

ubiquitous: The system SHALL expose a single primitive/component API surface from @project/ui that resolves to platform-correct implementations (DOM on web, React Native primitives on native) without consumer-side platform branching.

The system SHALL derive all color/spacing/typography values from @project/design-tokens semantic tokens as the single source of truth; no component SHALL contain hardcoded hex/px/CSS-variable string literals.
The system SHALL generate web CSS custom properties from @project/design-tokens (generateCSSVariables) at build time rather than maintaining a hand-copied duplicate in globals.css.
event: WHEN a mobile screen imports a UI primitive (Stack/Text/Pressable/Button) the system SHALL render a React Native node (View/Text/Pressable) that mounts without runtime error under Expo SDK 55.

WHEN the active theme mode changes (light<->dark) the system SHALL update consumed token values reactively on BOTH web (CSS variable swap) and native (VariableContextProvider/JS token re-read) within the same ThemeProvider contract.
WHEN a developer writes a hardcoded color/dimension in a UI component the system SHALL fail the lint gate (eslint-plugin-bp rule escalated warn->error).
state: WHILE NativeWind v5 remains pre-release and unvalidated against Expo SDK 55 the system SHALL NOT adopt it as the mobile styling runtime and SHALL use the stable fallback (JS-token consumption or NativeWind v4) per PDR-001.
WHILE both web (.web.tsx) and native (.native.tsx) implementations of a primitive exist the system SHALL enforce a shared typed prop interface (.types.ts) so the two cannot drift.
optional: WHERE a UI component is pure primitive composition (no raw DOM, no platform event semantics) the system MAY keep a single cross-platform file instead of a platform split.
WHERE NativeWind reaches stable status and passes the ADR-007 Section 43 readiness checklist the system MAY migrate mobile token consumption from JS-token objects to NativeWind className utilities.
constraint: IF react-native-web is proposed as the bridge THEN the system SHALL reject it because it conflicts with the existing Tailwind CSS 4 web runtime decision (ADR-007 web=Tailwind).

IF a mobile screen uses web event semantics (onChange + e.target.value, onClick) THEN the system SHALL convert it to native semantics (onChangeText/value, onPress) before the screen is considered ported.
IF the design-tokens semantic token shape (SemanticTokenSet) changes THEN every theme and every consumer SHALL be updated atomically (fan_in=5 contract).

risks.mitigation: B yolunu (platform-split) sec; web tarafini OLDUGU GIBI (Tailwind 4 + CSS variable) birak, sadece mobile tarafa RN primitive ekle. A yolunu acikca reddet ve gerekcesini ADR-016/yeni ADR'ye yaz

branches.branch: B1: Build config dosyalarini olustur (babel + metro)
tasks: apps/mobile/babel.config.js olustur: babel-preset-expo + react-native-worklets/plugin (EN SON), api.cache(true)
apps/mobile/metro.config.js olustur: expo/metro-config getDefaultConfig(__dirname), pnpm monorepo icin gerekirse watchFolders/nodeModulesPaths
NativeWind 5 ileride eklendiginde withNativeWind sarmasi icin metro.config'e genisletme noktasi birak (yorum)
npx expo start --clear ile Metro'nun temiz boot ettigini dogrula (kanit: bundling success)
branches.rationale: Bu iki dosya olmadan Metro bundle uretemez ve Reanimated worklet'leri kirilir; her seyin onkosulu. context7 ile birebir sablon dogrulandi.

branches.branch: B2: Test bootstrap (jest setup + ilk smoke test)
tasks: apps/mobile/src/test/setup.ts olustur: @testing-library/react-native matchers + gerekli mock'lar (expo-secure-store, react-native-mmkv, expo-local-authentication)
jest.config.js:10 setupFilesAfterFramework referansini dogrula (artik mevcut)
En az 1 smoke test ekle (App render veya bootstrap fonksiyon testi) ki --passWithNoTests maskelemesi kalksin
Mobil coverage threshold karari (enforcement temasi ile koordine)
branches.rationale: jest.config setupFilesAfterFramework olmayan dosyaya isaret ediyor; test altyapisi yarim. Diger temadaki test enforcement icin onkosul.

branches.branch: B3: Asset placeholder seti
tasks: assets/icon.png (1024x1024), splash.png (1284x2778), adaptive-icon.png (1024x1024) placeholder gorseller ekle
app.json:10-14 asset referanslarini dogrula
expo prebuild'in asset cozumlemede patlamadigini dogrula
derive script'in asset'leri proje-ozel uretmesi/uyarmasi icin not (governance temasi)
branches.rationale: app.json referanslari olu; expo prebuild ve EAS build asset olmadan hata verir. Placeholder yeterli, gorsel kalite Faz sonrasi.

branches.branch: B4: Bootstrap orchestration (olu init fonksiyonlarini wire et)
tasks: Bootstrap sekansi olustur: initSentry() -> await initEncryptedStorage() -> setupOfflineQueue(queryClient) (App mount oncesi veya useEffect+SplashScreen ile)
App.tsx'i GestureHandlerRootView ile sar + 'react-native-gesture-handler' import'unu en uste ekle
mmkv.ts:84-85 @MX:WARN unhandled rejection riskini orchestrator try/catch ile guard et
expo-constants'i apps/mobile/package.json dependencies'e ekle (sentry.ts:192 require'i icin)
Hermes dogrulamasi: global.HermesInternal !== undefined dev-time kontrolu (ADR-018 14.1.4)
branches.rationale: Uretim kalitesinde 3 bootstrap fonksiyonu fan_in=0; encrypted storage gercekten init olmuyor, gesture-handler dangling, expo-constants eksik dep. Tek noktadan orchestration cozer.

branches.branch: B5: Native entegrasyon netlestirme (kurulu/kurulu-degil sinirlari)
tasks: @sentry/react-native'i mobile dependency'e ekle (catalog'da var) VEYA 'kurulu degil' net karari belgele
expo-notifications (push), IAP, @react-native-community/netinfo icin: minimal entegrasyon mu yoksa net 'kurulu degil + abstraction hazir' isareti mi karari ver
offlineQueue.ts:23-31 netinfo stub'ini gercek netinfo ile aktiflestir VEYA conditional-require pattern'ine cevir (sentry.ts deseni gibi)
Her native dep icin ADR-018 bolum 11.3 uyumluluk audit'i (reactnativepackagedb + expo-doctor)
branches.rationale: Su an karisik: bazi entegrasyonlar yorum-stub (netinfo), bazisi conditional no-op (sentry), bazisi sadece config (deep-link). Net 'kurulu/degil' sinir cizgisi time-to-product icin kritik.

branches.branch: B6: Bootstrap dogrulama kapisi + deep-link literal duzeltme
tasks: AppNavigator.tsx:192 prefixes literal'ini app.json scheme'inden turet (hardcode kaldir) VEYA derive script'e src/ tarama ekle
CI expo-doctor job'unu (ci.yml:222) bootstrap_ready gate'i disinda da calisacak sekilde gozden gecir (governance temasi ile koordine)
ADR-018 bolum 14 bootstrap dogrulama kapisini script/checklist olarak somutlastir (expo-doctor temiz + dev build crash-free + Hermes aktif)
branches.rationale: Deep-link literal turetme buyu kaciriyor; expo-doctor gate'li oldugu icin upstream'de eksikler yakalanmiyor. ADR-018 zaten kapiyi tanimliyor, kodda yok.

ubiquitous: The system SHALL include a babel.config.js using babel-preset-expo with react-native-worklets/plugin as the last plugin in apps/mobile.
The system SHALL include a metro.config.js extending expo/metro-config getDefaultConfig(__dirname) in apps/mobile.
The system SHALL declare every imported native package (including expo-constants) in apps/mobile/package.json dependencies.
The system SHALL run all New Architecture targets (Fabric, JSI, TurboModules, Hermes V1) as the only supported mobile runtime per ADR-018.
event: WHEN the app entry point mounts, the system SHALL execute the bootstrap sequence initSentry then await initEncryptedStorage then setupOfflineQueue before rendering interactive screens.
WHEN npx expo start --clear is run, the system SHALL produce a successful Metro bundle without worklet or resolution errors.
WHEN npx expo-doctor is run, the system SHALL report zero New Architecture incompatibility errors.
WHEN a deep link with the project scheme is opened, the system SHALL resolve prefixes derived from app.json scheme rather than a hardcoded 'boilerplate://' literal.
state: WHILE the encrypted MMKV instance is not yet initialized, the system SHALL treat encrypted storage reads/writes as safe no-ops and SHALL NOT silently lose data after init completes.
WHILE a native integration package (push, IAP, netinfo, Sentry) is not installed, the system SHALL operate via a documented no-op abstraction with a clear 'not installed' signal.
optional: WHERE react-native-gesture-handler is a dependency, the system SHALL wrap the app root in GestureHandlerRootView and import the package at the entry top.
WHERE a smoke test setup is present (src/test/setup.ts), the system SHALL load testing-library matchers and native module mocks via jest setupFilesAfterFramework.
WHERE assets are referenced in app.json, the system SHALL provide icon.png, splash.png and adaptive-icon.png so expo prebuild and EAS build succeed.
constraint: IF react-native-reanimated is on the 4.x line THEN the system SHALL reference react-native-worklets/plugin (not the renamed react-native-reanimated/plugin) in babel config.
IF a new native dependency is added THEN the system SHALL verify New Architecture compatibility via reactnativepackagedb.com and expo-doctor before merge (ADR-018 11.5).

IF mobile screens consume @project/ui primitives THEN the system SHALL depend on the cross-platform-ui theme delivering React Native (onPress) primitives, since web-only (onClick/<button>) primitives crash under Hermes.
IF the bootstrap verification gate fails (expo-doctor errors, dev build crash, or global.HermesInternal undefined) THEN the system SHALL NOT consider the mobile foundation ready (ADR-018 14.2).

risks.risk: Cross-platform-ui temasina SERT bagimlilik: babel/metro/asset/bootstrap tamamlansa bile @project/ui web-only oldugu icin (Pressable=<button>, 0 .native split, react-native yok) 30 ekranin tamami Hermes'te crash eder. Bu tema TEK BASINA calisan bir mobil uygulama URETMEZ.
risks.mitigation: SPEC'i acikca cross-platform-ui temasina bagimli isaretle. Bootstrap temasini once tamamla (Metro boot + dogrulama altyapisi), ama 'ekranlar calisir' acceptance kriterini UI port'una bagla. Iki temayi tek faz icinde sirali planla (B1-B4 once, ekran dogrulamasi UI port sonrasi).

risks.risk: worklets 0.7.2 pinli surum ile reanimated ^4.0.0 katalog araliginin uyumsuzlugu (minor mismatch) babel plugin'i sessizce kirabilir; 38-version-compatibility-matrix minor mismatch'i yasakliyor.
risks.mitigation: babel.config.js olustururken expo-doctor + npx expo install --check ile reanimated/worklets surum uyumunu dogrula. Gerekirse worklets'i de catalog'a tasi. context7 reanimated 4.1.5 uyumlulugunu teyit et.

risks.risk: pnpm 10 hoisting + Metro symlink cozumlemesi: monorepo'da metro.config default watchFolders workspace paketlerini gormeyebilir; @project/ui ve @project/design-tokens transform edilmeden kalabilir.
risks.mitigation: metro.config.js'e workspace root watchFolders + nodeModulesPaths ekle; expo/metro-config'in monorepo destegini context7 ile dogrula. unstable_enableSymlinks kontrol et.

risks.risk: Bootstrap orchestration sirasi yanlissa (initEncryptedStorage await edilmezse) encryptedStorage sessizce no-op kalir ve kullanici verisi kaybolur (mmkv.ts:126 sessiz atla).
risks.mitigation: Orchestrator'da await initEncryptedStorage()'i SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync ile esle; init tamamlanmadan interaktif ekran render etme. mmkv.ts:84-85 @MX:WARN'i try/catch ile guard et.

risks.risk: expo prebuild placeholder degerlerle (updates.url 'YOUR_PROJECT_ID', associatedDomains 'example.com', google-services-key.json yok) calistirilirsa EAS build/submit asamasinda hata verir.
risks.mitigation: Placeholder'lari net 'TODO: turetilen projede doldur' isaretiyle birak; derive script (create-project.sh) bunlari proje-ozel doldursun. Bootstrap temasi sadece LOCAL boot'u garanti etsin, magaza submit'i kapsam disi.

risks.risk: CI expo-doctor job'u bootstrap_ready gate'i ile atlandigi icin (ci.yml:225) bu temada eklenen babel/metro/dep duzeltmeleri upstream repoda regresyon korumasi olmadan kalir; gelecekte tekrar bozulabilir.
risks.mitigation: expo-doctor'u boilerplate modunda da (en azindan dependency uyumlulugu icin) calistiracak sekilde gate'i gevset; governance/enforcement temasi ile koordine et.

dependencies: cross-platform-ui temasi (SERT bagimlilik): @project/ui RN primitive'lerine (onPress) port edilmeden 30 ekran calismaz; bu tema mobil boot'u saglar ama ekran render'i UI port'una baglidir
design-tokens -> component baglama temasi: nativewindStrategy.ts ve metro.config NativeWind 5 sarmasi UI token kopru karariyla koordine olmali
enforcement/CI temasi: expo-doctor gate gevsetme, mobil coverage threshold, jest setup test enforcement bu temada baslar ama enforcement temasinda kesinlesir
governance/derive temasi: create-project.sh'in src/ icindeki deep-link literal'ini (AppNavigator.tsx:192) ve asset'leri turetmesi; ADR-018 bootstrap dogrulama kapisinin script'lestirilmesi
auth wiring temasi (gevsek): biometric.ts + secureStorage.ts bootstrap'ta initEncryptedStorage ile baglanir; logout cleanup contract koordinasyonu

researches.title: Uretime gecis: web deploy + env sema dogrulama + EAS paritesi

currentState.finding: Web deploy adimi tamamen stub — gercek hosting deploy yok. workflow_dispatch ile manuel tetikleniyor, web build edilip 'echo' ile bitiyor. Production'a hicbir sey gitmiyor.
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy.yml:45-46 — name: Deploy to hosting / run: echo "Web build tamamlandi. Hosting deploy adimi buraya eklenecek."

currentState.finding: deploy.yml'de hicbir hosting secret/env referansi yok. Sadece mobil tarafta secrets.EXPO_TOKEN var. Web icin VERCEL_TOKEN/NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN/CLOUDFLARE gibi hicbir secret tanimli degil; web deploy job'unda VITE_* env injection yok.
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy.yml — grep ile sadece satir 63 token: secrets.EXPO_TOKEN buluniyor; web-deploy job'unda environment: yok, env injection yok

currentState.finding: Mobil deploy (EAS) workflow seviyesinde GERCEK: expo/expo-github-action@v8 + EXPO_TOKEN + profile bazli (preview/production) eas build --platform all --non-interactive. Yani web ile mobil arasinda buyuk paritesizlik var (mobil gercek, web stub).
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy.yml:58-72 — uses: expo/expo-github-action@v8 / eas build --platform all --profile preview|production --non-interactive

currentState.finding: ANCAK EAS build pratikte PATLAR: apps/mobile'da babel.config.js ve metro.config.js YOK; assets/ icinde sadece .gitkeep var ama app.json icon/splash/adaptive-icon (./assets/icon.png, ./assets/splash.png, ./assets/adaptive-icon.png) referans ediyor. Asset olmadan ve metro/babel config olmadan EAS build/expo prebuild basarisiz olur. Yani mobil deploy 'workflow var ama calismaz' durumunda.
currentState.evidence: apps/mobile/ — babel.config.js NO, metro.config.js NO; assets/ sadece .gitkeep (0 byte); app.json:11-14,55 ./assets/icon.png ./assets/splash.png ./assets/adaptive-icon.png referansli

currentState.finding: Env sema dogrulamasi (fail-fast) tamamen yok. .env.example 13+ degisken tanimliyor ama hicbiri sema ile dogrulanmiyor. zod catalog'da var (^4.3.6) ama env validation icin kullanilmamis. import.meta.env sadece sentry.ts'de ham erisiliyor, type guard yok.
currentState.evidence: .env.example (git HEAD) VITE_APP_NAME, VITE_API_BASE_URL, VITE_SENTRY_DSN, VITE_ANALYTICS_KEY, VITE_DEEP_LINK_DOMAIN, EXPO_PUBLIC_* (8 adet) tanimli; apps/web/src/observability/sentry.ts:4,11,21 import.meta.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN/MODE/PROD ham erisim; zod env semasi grep ile 0

currentState.finding: VITE_API_BASE_URL tanimli ama hicbir uygulama kodunda OKUNMUYOR. packages/core/src/api/client.ts createApiClient(config) baseURL param aliyor ama bu fonksiyon apps/ icinde HIC cagrilmiyor (0 consumer). Sample feature %100 in-memory mock (delay + mockItems). Yani API base url env'i olu.
currentState.evidence: git grep VITE_API_BASE_URL -> sadece .env.example; packages/core/src/api/client.ts:37,53 baseURL kullaniyor ama createClient caller'lari sadece README ve index re-export; apps/web/src/features/sample/api.ts mockItems + delay()

currentState.finding: vite.config.ts'de proxy yok ve env okuma yok. server: { port: 3000 } disinda bir sey yok; define/envPrefix/loadEnv yok. vite-env.d.ts sadece '/// <reference types=vite/client />' — typed ImportMetaEnv interface tanimi yok, yani import.meta.env.VITE_* tipsiz (any).
currentState.evidence: apps/web/vite.config.ts tam icerik (proxy yok, env yok); apps/web/src/vite-env.d.ts tek satir vite/client reference

currentState.finding: SPA-first (ADR-001) olmasina ragmen hicbir SPA fallback/rewrite konfigurasyonu yok: vercel.json, netlify.toml, _redirects, wrangler.toml, staticwebapp.config.json, firebase.json — hicbiri yok. Web build code-split lazy route chunk'lari uretiyor (LoginPage, HomePage, ProfilePage vb. ayri .js). Static host'ta /login gibi deep link'ler index.html'e rewrite olmadan 404 verir.
currentState.evidence: find ile vercel.json/netlify.toml/_redirects/wrangler.toml/firebase.json -> hicbiri yok; apps/web/dist/assets/ LoginPage-*.js HomePage-*.js ProfilePage-*.js ... (lazy chunk'lar) -> client-side routing aktif

currentState.finding: Turborepo 2.x env declaration yok. turbo.json build task'inda env/globalEnv yok. VITE_* degiskenleri build hash'ine girmiyor -> farkli env ile ayni cache hit olabilir, stale/yanlis env'li build riski (Turbo strict env mode).
currentState.evidence: turbo.json (git HEAD) tasks.build sadece dependsOn ^build + outputs dist/build; env: ve globalEnv: anahtarlari yok

currentState.finding: deploy.yml workflow_dispatch-only — push/tag tetikleyici yok. notify-derived-projects.yml bp-v* tag'inde calisiyor ama git tag -l BOS (0 bp-v* tag). Yani release->deploy zinciri kopuk; deploy hicbir release event'ine bagli degil.
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy.yml:11 on: workflow_dispatch; git tag -l bos; notify-derived-projects.yml on: push tags bp-v*

currentState.finding: CI (ci.yml) build job 'pnpm build' calistiriyor (web+mobil typecheck/lint/test/build/expo-doctor) ama deploy ile bagi yok. CI'da artifact upload yok; build ciktisi deploy'a tasinmiyor (deploy ayri checkout+build yapiyor -> cift build).
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml build job: pnpm build; artifact upload step yok; deploy.yml web-deploy bagimsiz pnpm --filter @project/web build calistiriyor

currentState.finding: docs/operations/runbook deploy rollback prosedurunu tanimliyor ama sadece mobil/OTA odakli (eas update:rollback, App Store phased rollback). Web deploy rollback prosedurü YOK. ADR-001 web build sanity'yi resmi gate ilan ediyor ama deploy pipeline'i tanimlamamis.
currentState.evidence: docs/operations/runbook-and-incident-response.md:71-81 §4.1 sadece OTA/native rollback; ADR-001 satir 478 'web build sanity resmi gate olacaktir' ama deploy hedefi tanimsiz

referenceImplementations.pattern: EAS GitHub Action entegrasyon deseni (token + profile bazli build) — web deploy job'u bu yapiya benzetilerek parite kurulabilir
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Mobil tarafin secret yonetimi (EXPO_TOKEN), profile (preview/production) ve non-interactive deseni web deploy'un model alacagi calisan ornek. Web deploy ayni preview/production input'una baglanmali.

referenceImplementations.pattern: repo-mode detection (bootstrap_ready) ile docs-only vs derived ayrimi — deploy/env job'lari ayni guard'i kullanmali
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Canonical (docs-only) repoda deploy/env-validation calismamali; derived project'te aktiflesmeli. Yeni env-validation ve web-deploy job'lari bu repo-mode pattern'ini miras almali ki canonical repo CI'i kirilmasin.

referenceImplementations.pattern: createApiClient(config) factory zaten baseURL/timeout/onUnauthorized aliyor — env'den gelen VITE_API_BASE_URL buraya baglanacak tek nokta
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Env semasi dogrulandiktan sonra env.VITE_API_BASE_URL bu factory'ye gecirilerek mock->gercek API gecisi tek noktadan yapilir. Halihazirda 0 consumer oldugu icin temiz wire-up noktasi.

referenceImplementations.pattern: observability/sentry.ts ham import.meta.env / Constants.expoConfig.extra erisim deseni — env sema modulunun degistirecegi/ornek alacagi mevcut platform-bazli env okuma
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Web import.meta.env, mobil Constants.expoConfig.extra kullaniyor. Cross-platform env semasi bu iki farkli runtime kaynagini soyutlamali; mevcut kod hangi degiskenlerin nerede okundugunu gosteren referans.

referenceImplementations.pattern: Node surum pin'i 3 yerde tutarli (engines + .nvmrc + .node-version) — deploy host Node ayari bununla hizalanmali
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Vercel/Netlify/Cloudflare build ayarinda Node 20 secilmeli; host'un engines'i okumasi veya .node-version'i kullanmasi parite icin gerekli. Mevcut pin deploy config'in referans alacagi kaynak.

externalPatterns.approach: t3-env @t3-oss/env-core ile framework-agnostik env semasi (server/client/shared + clientPrefix + runtimeEnv + emptyStringAsUndefined)
externalPatterns.source: context7 /t3-oss/t3-env — createEnv core paketi; clientPrefix VITE_ (web) icin, EXPO_PUBLIC_ (mobil) icin; runtimeEnv import.meta.env veya process.env
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: Cross-platform (web import.meta.env + mobil EXPO_PUBLIC_) tek API ile cozulur; type-safe autocomplete; build-time fail-fast; onValidationError ile ozel hata. EKSI: ekstra dependency (zod zaten var, env-core kucuk). Bu projeye COK uygun cunku web/mobil iki farkli prefix ve runtime var; ham zod ile yazmak yerine standart cozum. Alternatif (ham zod schema) reddedildi: clientPrefix enforcement, server/client ayrimi ve runtimeEnv mapping'i elle yazmak tekrar/hata kaynagi.

externalPatterns.approach: Vercel official Action — CLI-based (stable, default) deploy + vercel.json rewrites ile SPA fallback
externalPatterns.source: WebSearch: vercel.com/docs/project-configuration/vercel-json + github.com/marketplace/actions/vercel-action
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: SPA-first ADR-001 ile birebir uyumlu (rewrites: tum route -> /index.html); preview/production ayrimi native; en olgun React+Vite SPA hosting'i. EKSI: vendor lock (ama derived project karari). API-mode deneysel/kirilgan oldugu icin CLI-mode onerilir. SPA fallback'i mutlaka vercel.json rewrites ile vermek gerekir yoksa deep link 404.

externalPatterns.approach: Netlify (netlify.toml + _redirects /* /index.html 200) alternatifi
externalPatterns.source: WebSearch (Vercel community + genel SPA redirect deseni)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: SPA fallback en basit (_redirects tek satir); build plugin ekosistemi olgun. EKSI: monorepo (pnpm+turbo) build base path ayari gerekli. Vercel'e gore Vite SPA icin marjinal fark; secim derived project'e birakilmali ama boilerplate adapter-agnostik bir deploy abstraction sunmali.

externalPatterns.approach: Cloudflare Pages (wrangler / Pages action + SPA mode) alternatifi
externalPatterns.source: WebSearch genel + find taramasinda wrangler.toml yok
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: edge dagitim, ucuz/genis free tier, SPA single-page app modu otomatik fallback. EKSI: GitHub Action olgunlugu Vercel'e gore daha az dokumanli; build output dir (dist) ayari ve _routes.json gerekebilir. Bu proje icin ucuncu secenek; karar derived project'e birakilmali.

externalPatterns.approach: Expo EAS env yonetimi: eas env (dashboard/CLI) + eas env:pull, EXPO_TOKEN secret ile CI auth
externalPatterns.source: WebSearch: docs.expo.dev/eas/environment-variables + docs.expo.dev/build/building-on-ci + github.com/expo/expo-github-action
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: EAS-native env (EXPO_PUBLIC_* dashboard'da yonetilir, build/runtime'a otomatik enjekte). expo-github-action token'i her job'da export eder. EKSI: web env'i (VITE_*) ile mobil env'i (EXPO_PUBLIC_*) iki ayri yerde (GitHub secrets vs EAS env) yonetilir -> parite icin tek kaynak/dokumantasyon gerekli. eas env:pull ile lokal parite saglanir.

externalPatterns.approach: Turborepo 2.x build task'inda env/globalEnv declaration (strict env mode)
externalPatterns.source: WebSearch genel Turborepo bilgisi + turbo.json incelemesi (env yok)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: VITE_*/EXPO_PUBLIC_* degiskenlerini build task.env'e eklemek cache hash'ini env'e duyarli yapar -> yanlis env'li stale build engellenir. EKSI: env listesini elle tutmak gerekir (ama az sayida degisken). Bu proje icin DUSUK efor, YUKSEK deger: deploy guvenilirligi icin sart.

branches.branch: Web deploy hedefi secimi ve gercek deploy pipeline
branches.rationale: deploy.yml:45 stub echo. SPA-first ADR-001 ile uyumlu, adapter-agnostik bir web deploy job'u gerekli. Vercel (CLI-mode, default) oneri; Netlify/Cloudflare alternatif. Host secimi derived project'e birakilmali ama boilerplate bir referans implementasyon + bos slot sunmali.
tasks: Web deploy hedefini karara baglamak icin AskUserQuestion ile secenek sun (Vercel onerilen / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages / placeholder-agnostik)
deploy.yml web-deploy job'undaki echo stub'i secilen hostun official action'i ile degistir (preview/production input'una bagli)
web-deploy job'una environment: (preview|production) ve gerekli secret'lari (orn. VERCEL_TOKEN/VERCEL_ORG_ID/VERCEL_PROJECT_ID) ekle
CI build artifact'ini deploy'a tasiyarak cift build'i kaldir VEYA deploy'un kendi build'ini koru kararini ver (trade-off: artifact passing vs basitlik)

branches.branch: SPA fallback / client-side routing rewrite konfigurasyonu
branches.rationale: ADR-001 SPA-first + React Router 7 client-side routing + dist code-split lazy chunk'lar. Hicbir rewrite config yok -> deep link (orn. /login) static host'ta 404. Bu uretim-blocker.
tasks: Secilen hosta gore SPA fallback config olustur (vercel.json rewrites VEYA netlify.toml/_redirects VEYA Cloudflare _routes/SPA mode)
Asset cache header'lari icin hashed asset'lere immutable cache, index.html'e no-cache stratejisi tanimla
Deep link smoke test (deploy sonrasi /login, /profile gibi route'larin 200 dondugunu dogrulayan adim) ekle

branches.branch: Cross-platform env sema dogrulama (fail-fast)
branches.rationale: .env.example 13+ degisken ama 0 sema dogrulama; import.meta.env tipsiz; VITE_API_BASE_URL olu. t3-env env-core ile web (VITE_) + mobil (EXPO_PUBLIC_) tek soyutlama.
tasks: packages/core (veya yeni packages/env) icinde t3-env env-core tabanli createEnv semasi tasarla: server/client/shared + clientPrefix
Web tarafi runtimeEnv: import.meta.env, mobil tarafi runtimeEnv: Constants.expoConfig.extra/process.env adapter'i tasarla
vite-env.d.ts'e typed ImportMetaEnv interface ekle (import.meta.env.VITE_* tipli olsun)
emptyStringAsUndefined + onValidationError ile build-time fail-fast davranisi tanimla (eksik/gecersiz env'de build patlamali)
VITE_API_BASE_URL'i createApiClient'a baglayan wire-up noktasini belirle (su an 0 consumer) — mock->gercek API gecis koprusu

branches.branch: EAS mobil deploy gercek calisabilirligi (parite on-kosulu)
branches.rationale: deploy.yml mobil job 'gercek' gorunuyor ama babel/metro config + asset eksikligi yuzunden EAS build PATLAR. Web ile parite kurmadan once mobil deploy'un gercekten calismasi saglanmali.
tasks: apps/mobile/babel.config.js ve metro.config.js eksikligini SPEC bagimliligi olarak isaretle (bu temanin disinda ama on-kosul)
app.json'un referans ettigi asset'lerin (icon.png, splash.png, adaptive-icon.png) varligini deploy on-kosul olarak dogrula (assets/ sadece .gitkeep)
EAS env yonetimini (eas env / EXPO_PUBLIC_* dashboard vs GitHub secrets) web env yonetimi ile tek dokumana baglayarak parite kur
eas.json submit blogundaki placeholder'lari (APPLE_ID_HERE, ASC_APP_ID_HERE) derived project doldurma noktasi olarak isaretle

branches.branch: Deploy-CI-release zincir entegrasyonu ve Turbo env declaration
branches.rationale: deploy workflow_dispatch-only, release event'ine bagli degil; turbo.json env declaration yok (stale build riski); CI build deploy'a tasinmiyor.
tasks: turbo.json build/typecheck task'larina env (VITE_*, EXPO_PUBLIC_*) ve gerekirse globalEnv ekle (cache dogrulugu)
deploy tetiklemeyi bp-v* tag / release event ile opsiyonel baglama karari ver (notify-derived ile tutarli)
docs/operations/runbook'a web deploy rollback prosedurü ekle (su an sadece OTA/native var)
repo-mode (bootstrap_ready) guard'ini deploy ve env-validation job'larina uygulayarak canonical repo'da no-op davranisi koru

ubiquitous: The system SHALL validate all environment variables against a typed schema at build time and fail the build when required variables are missing or invalid (fail-fast).
The system SHALL expose web environment variables via the VITE_ prefix and mobile environment variables via the EXPO_PUBLIC_ prefix through a single cross-platform env module.
The system SHALL provide a typed ImportMetaEnv interface so that import.meta.env.VITE_* access is type-checked.
The web application SHALL ship a host SPA-fallback configuration that rewrites all non-asset routes to /index.html.
event: WHEN the web-production or web-preview deploy target is dispatched, the system SHALL build apps/web and deploy the output to the configured hosting target (not a stub echo).
WHEN a deep-link route (e.g. /login) is requested on the deployed web host, the system SHALL serve index.html with HTTP 200 instead of 404.
WHEN an environment variable fails schema validation, the system SHALL report the offending variable name and abort the deploy.
state: WHILE running in the canonical docs-only repo (bootstrap_ready=false), the system SHALL skip web-deploy and env-validation jobs without failing CI.
WHILE building with Turborepo, the system SHALL include declared env variables in the cache hash so that a build with different env values does not reuse a stale cached output.
optional: WHERE a VITE_API_BASE_URL is provided, the system SHALL wire it into createApiClient so the application targets a real API instead of in-memory mocks.
WHERE the hosting target is Vercel, the system SHALL use the official CLI-based action with a vercel.json rewrites SPA fallback.
WHERE EAS environment variables are managed in the Expo dashboard, the system SHALL document parity with web GitHub secrets in a single source.
constraint: IF apps/mobile lacks babel.config.js, metro.config.js, or the assets referenced by app.json (icon.png, splash.png, adaptive-icon.png) THEN the system SHALL block the mobile EAS deploy with a clear precondition error.
IF a web deploy occurs THEN the system SHALL inject the validated VITE_* variables into the build so secrets are not hardcoded.
IF the deploy host is changed THEN the system SHALL keep the SPA-fallback rewrite contract intact (deep links must resolve to index.html).

risks.risk: Web deploy host secimi (Vercel/Netlify/Cloudflare) boilerplate'i belirli bir vendor'a kilitleyebilir; derived project farkli host isteyebilir.
risks.mitigation: Boilerplate'i adapter-agnostik kur: tek referans implementasyon (Vercel CLI-mode onerilen) + diger hostlar icin dokumante edilmis placeholder. Host-spesifik config'i (vercel.json vb.) derived project override edebilir; SPA-fallback contract'i host'tan bagimsiz EARS kurali olarak sabitle.

risks.risk: t3-env'in web (import.meta.env, build-time inline) ile mobil (Constants.expoConfig.extra, runtime) farkli env enjeksiyon modelleri tek semada catisabilir; mobil tarafta import.meta.env yok.
risks.mitigation: runtimeEnv'i platform bazli adapter ile besle: web build'inde import.meta.env, mobil'de Constants/process.env. Client/server ayrimini SPA icin sadece client+shared olarak kullan (server scope web SPA'da anlamsiz). Mevcut sentry.ts platform-split deseni referans alinmali.

risks.risk: Turbo build env declaration eklemek mevcut cache'leri invalidate eder; ilk build'ler yavaslar ve CI'da beklenmedik cache miss olabilir.
risks.mitigation: env listesini minimal tut (sadece build ciktisini etkileyen VITE_* degiskenleri). Tek seferlik cache invalidation kabul edilebilir; deploy dogrulugu performanstan oncelikli. Degisikligi env-validation SPEC'i ile ayni PR'da grupla.

risks.risk: Mobil EAS deploy 'parite' iddiasi yaniltici: workflow var ama babel/metro/asset eksikligi yuzunden calismaz. Web parite kurulurken mobil de gercekten test edilmezse iki taraf da 'yarim' kalir.
risks.mitigation: Mobil build on-kosullarini (babel/metro/asset) ayri bir SPEC bagimliligi olarak isaretle ve bu temanin DoD'una 'EAS build dry-run/expo prebuild gecmeli' kriteri ekle. expo-doctor CI'da zaten var ama prebuild/build dogrulamasi yok.

risks.risk: VITE_API_BASE_URL'i createApiClient'a baglamak (mock->gercek API) bu temanin kapsamini auth/veri-katmani temalariyla cakistirir; scope creep riski.
risks.mitigation: Bu temada sadece env semasini ve baglama NOKTASINI tasarla (wire-up kontrati), gercek API entegrasyonunu veri-katmani SPEC'ine bagimlilik olarak birak. Scope discipline: env validation + deploy + parite; API client tuketimi out-of-scope ama interface sabitlenir.

risks.risk: deploy.yml workflow_dispatch-only kalirsa otomatik production deploy olmaz; release zincirine baglanirsa (bp-v* tag) yanlislikla production deploy tetiklenebilir.
risks.mitigation: Deploy tetigini varsayilan workflow_dispatch (manuel/guvenli) tut; tag-bazli otomatik deploy'u opsiyonel/dokumante edilmis bir karar olarak birak (derived project secer). Production deploy'a environment protection rule (manual approval) onerisi ekle.

dependencies: Mobil runtime hazirligi temasi (babel.config.js + metro.config.js + assets) — EAS deploy paritesinin on-kosulu; bu eksikler giderilmeden mobil deploy gercekten calismaz
Veri katmani / API entegrasyonu temasi — VITE_API_BASE_URL'in createApiClient'a baglanmasi ve mock->gercek API gecisi bu temaya bagimli (env burada sema+wire-up noktasini sabitler)
Auth wire-up temasi — production'da auth gerektiren route'larin deep-link/SPA fallback davranisi ve session env'leri ile kesisir
Upstream sync / versiyonlama temasi (bp-v* tag, git tag -l bos) — deploy'un release event'ine baglanmasi bu tema ile koordineli olmali
Governance: ADR-001 (SPA-first), 29-release-and-versioning-rules, docs/operations/runbook — deploy/rollback prosedurleri ve release siniflandirmasi ile uyum

researches.title: Enforcement-first kalite: lint gate + coverage threshold + E2E davranis + scaffolding testleri

currentState.finding: 19 bp-rule'un TAMAMI eslint.config.js'de 'warn' seviyesinde; recommended.js'deki error/warn gradyani (no-hardcoded-color, no-raw-pressable vb. 'error') KULLANILMIYOR — eslint.config.js inline override ile hepsini ezip 'warn' yapiyor.
currentState.evidence: eslint.config.js:124-143 (19 kural hepsi 'warn'); packages/eslint-plugin-bp/src/configs/recommended.js:8-26 (8 kural 'error' tanimli ama referans edilmiyor)

currentState.finding: CI lint job'inda --max-warnings 0 YOK; turbo lint -> 'eslint .' (workspace basina) cagiriyor, warning sayisini gate etmiyor. 146 src-level bp/ts warning hicbir sey gate etmeden birikiyor (yanictici yesil cekirdek mekanizmasi).
currentState.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml:178 'run: pnpm lint'; apps/web/package.json lint='eslint .'; apps/mobile/package.json lint='eslint .' (--max-warnings yok)

currentState.finding: ONEMLI DUZELTME (audit eskimis): 'turbo run lint' BUGUN exit 1 donuyor (RED). Dist haric src-level 29 error-severity ihlal var (web 2 + mobile 22 + ui 5). Bunlar bp-rule degil, generic: 24x no-explicit-any + 4x no-console + 1 no-undef. Yani CI lint job'i 'her zaman yesil' DEGIL — bp-rule warning'leri gate etmiyor ama generic error'lar zaten kiriyor. Sorun: bp-rule katmaninin gate'lememesi.
currentState.evidence: 'npx turbo run lint --output-logs=none' exit=1 (canli olcum); per-workspace JSON: apps/web 2 err/56 warn, apps/mobile 22 err/52 warn, packages/ui 5 err/38 warn, packages/core 0 err/1 warn

currentState.finding: Web vitest.config.ts'de coverage bloku TAMAMEN YOK; test script 'vitest run' (--coverage bayragi yok). @vitest/coverage-v8 provider lockfile'da bile YOK (grep count=0) — threshold eklemek once provider kurulumu gerektiren sert bagimlilik.
