referenceImplementations.pattern: Yuksek kaliteli davranis-odakli unit test (mock fetch, edge case, log assertion). Yeni testler bu altin sablonu izlemeli.
referenceImplementations.location: apps/web/src/auth/session.test.ts:1-48 (checkSession network-failure 'expired' davranisi, logout best-effort, 401 unauthenticated)
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: E2E ve coverage testleri yazilirken 'render olduysa gec' degil 'davranisi assert et' standardini gosteren projedeki tek referans. mobile/core testleri bunu taklit etmeli.

referenceImplementations.pattern: 7 mevcut web unit test dosyasi (session, useAuth, analytics, Button, Primitives, sample/hooks, sample/api) — coverage threshold'un uzerine kurulacagi baz.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Coverage baseline'i bu 7 dosyadan cikacak; threshold once mevcut kapsami olcup gerceklci taban (orn. lines 40-50%) belirlemeli, sonra ratchet ile yukseltmeli.

referenceImplementations.pattern: recommended.js'deki error/warn severity gradyani — hangi kuralin 'error', hangisinin 'warn' olmasi gerektigine dair zaten dusunulmus karar tablosu.
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Kademeli warn->error gecisinde 'once hangi kurallar error olmali' sorusu zaten yanitlanmis (8 kural error adayi). Faz planlamasinin baslangic noktasi; ANCAK flat-config'de 'plugins:[...]' array sozdizimi gecersiz, duzeltilmeli.

referenceImplementations.pattern: CI boundary/security job'lari: grep tabanli ihlal taramasi + exit 1 deseni (echo + exit 1).
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Scaffolding rename ihlali (prefixes, kalan 'boilerplate' literal) icin ayni 'grep -> exit 1' gate desenini yeniden kullanabiliriz; CI'da yeni bir 'scaffold-verify' job'i bu sablonu izleyebilir.

referenceImplementations.pattern: upstream-sync.sh hash karsilastirma + diff-3way merge mantigi (test edilebilir saf bash fonksiyonlari).
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Bats smoke testi yazarken bu fonksiyonlar gercek hedef; mevcut yapi parametre alip exit-code donduren bash, bats ile test edilebilir durumda.

externalPatterns.approach: Vitest coverage.thresholds: glob-pattern per-file threshold + negatif sayi ile 'maks N satir kapsanmamis' + autoUpdate ratchet fonksiyonu
externalPatterns.source: context7 /vitest-dev/vitest docs/config/coverage.md (dogrulandi)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: per-package farkli taban (core %95, ui %70), negatif limit ('lines:-10') flaky yuzde yerine mutlak tavan, autoUpdate ile ratchet (yalniz yukari). Eksi: @vitest/coverage-v8 provider EKLENMELI (su an lockfile'da yok); ilk threshold dusuk olmali yoksa CI aninda kirar. Bu proje icin uygun: time-to-product oncelikli oldugu icin global dusuk tabandan ratchet ile baslayip kritik paketlerde (core, auth) yuksek taban.

externalPatterns.approach: Playwright davranis testi: getByLabel().fill() -> getByRole('button').click() -> expect(page).toHaveURL(/regex/) + toBeVisible(metin)
externalPatterns.source: context7 /microsoft/playwright docs/src/auth.md + api/class-pageassertions.md (dogrulandi)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: web-first assertion auto-wait, login flow gercekten dogrulanir (form+redirect), getByLabel a11y'yi de zorlar (require-accessibility-props ile sinerji). Eksi: gercek login icin backend/mock gerekir (su an %100 in-memory mock — AUTH/API temasina bagimli). Bu proje icin uygun: mock'a karsi bile 'form doldur->submit->URL degisti' assert'i mevcut 'heading visible'den kat kat degerli.

externalPatterns.approach: eslint-plugin-bp icin RuleTester (eslint/RuleTester veya vitest entegrasyonu) ile valid/invalid case matrisi
externalPatterns.source: context7 javascript.md + ESLint RuleTester yerlesik API (endustri standardi)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: her kuralin regex/AST mantigi regresyona karsi kilitlenir, kural eklerken TDD. Eksi: 19 kural icin test yazmak ON-yatirim (time-to-product'a karsi gerilim). Bu proje icin uygun: bp-rule'lar tum turetilen projelerin kalite cekirdegi; bir regex hatasi 30 ekrana yayilir, bu yuzden yuksek kaldirac.

externalPatterns.approach: CI'da kademeli enforcement: --max-warnings baseline + bp-rule severity'yi paket/dizin bazli error'a cevirme (ratchet/baseline lint)
externalPatterns.source: endustri best-practice (ratchet/baseline lint) + mevcut ci.yml job sablonu
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: 146 warning'i tek seferde error yapip CI'i kilitlemeden, 'yeni kod icin 0 warning, eski kod icin baseline' yaklasimi. Eksi: turbo lint'in --max-warnings'i workspace script'ine gomulu olmali (turbo argv passthrough sinirli). Bu proje icin uygun: mevcut 146 warning'i once dondurup (baseline), yeni ihlali engelle.

externalPatterns.approach: Scaffolding/upstream-sync icin bats-core smoke testi (gecici dizinde create-project.sh --skip-install calistir, ciktida kalan 'boilerplate'/'@project' ara)
externalPatterns.source: bats-core (bash test standardi); guncel desen WebSearch ile dogrulanabilir
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Arti: turetme bozuldugunda CI yakalar (su an hic test yok), prefixes/deep-link rename regresyonu onlenir. Eksi: bats CI'a ek kurulum (apt/brew), bash testleri yavas. Bu proje icin uygun: scaffolding urunun '0. dakika' deneyimi; sessiz bir rename hatasi her turetilen projeyi bozar.

branches.branch: B1 — bp-rule severity gradyani + kademeli warn->error gecisi
branches.rationale: Yanictici yesilin kok nedeni: 19 bp-rule 'warn' ve hicbiri gate etmiyor. Severity'yi tek-kaynaktan (recommended.js) yonetip kademeli error'a cikarmadan diger gate'ler etkisiz kalir. Once duzelt sonra yukselt yaklasimi CI'i kilitlemeden ilerlemeyi saglar.
tasks: recommended.js'i flat-config uyumlu hale getir (gecersiz 'plugins:[...]' array sozdizimini kaldir, sadece rules birak) ve eslint.config.js'in inline 19x'warn' override'ini recommended config'i extend edecek sekilde yeniden kur

146 warning'i kural bazinda siniflandir (require-accessibility-props 50, no-hardcoded-font-weight 36, require-form-hook 14 ...) ve duzeltme maliyeti dusuk olanlari (deterministik, az dosya) ilk faza al

Faz 1 error adaylari: no-hardcoded-color/font-size/font-weight, no-raw-pressable/touchable/rn-text/modal, no-token-category-mismatch, no-direct-*-import -> once mevcut ihlalleri sifirla sonra 'error'a yukselt
require-accessibility-props (50 ihlal) ve require-form-hook (14) gibi yuksek-hacimli kurallar icin ayri faz: once ihlal duzelt, sonra error

branches.branch: B2 — CI lint gate sertlestirme (--max-warnings 0 + generic error temizligi)
branches.rationale: Gate'in gercek hedefi 'sifir warning ile yesil'. Su an CI generic error'lardan (29) zaten kirik olabilir ama bp-warning'ler hic gate etmiyor. Once gercekten yesile getir, sonra --max-warnings baseline->0 ratchet uygula ki regresyon kacmasin.
tasks: Mevcut 29 generic error'i (24 no-explicit-any + 4 no-console + 1 no-undef) duzelt VEYA targeted exception ekle — CI lint'i once gercekten yesile getir (su an exit 1)
Workspace lint script'lerine '--max-warnings <baseline>' ekle: ilk adimda mevcut sayiya esitle (web 56, mobile 52, ui 38), sonraki PR'larda kademeli dusur (ratchet)
ci.yml lint job'ina acik 'eslint . --max-warnings 0' hedefini faz faz uygula; turbo passthrough sinirini workspace script'ine gomerek as
Hedef-durum: yeni kod 0 warning, eski kod baseline; nihai hedefte tum bp-rule 'error' + --max-warnings 0

branches.branch: B3 — Coverage threshold (web + core oncelikli)
branches.rationale: Test var ama hicbir taban yok; 'pnpm test' gecse de kapsam erozyona acik. Threshold olmadan yeni kod testsiz girebilir. core (531 LOC, 0 test) ve mobile (0 test) en buyuk risk. Provider eksikligi sert on-kosul.
tasks: @vitest/coverage-v8'i dev dependency olarak ekle (catalog uzerinden) — threshold'un sert on-kosulu
web vitest.config.ts'e coverage bloku ekle: provider v8, reporter text+json+html, mevcut 7 testten gercek baseline olc
thresholds'u glob-pattern ile kur: kritik dizinler (src/auth/**, @project/core) yuksek (lines 80+/branches 70+), genel taban dusuk-ama-pozitif; autoUpdate ratchet ile yalniz-yukari
packages/core icin vitest.config + ilk karakterizasyon testleri + threshold; mobil jest icin coverageThreshold + src/test/setup.ts olustur (--passWithNoTests'i kaldir)

branches.branch: B4 — E2E davranis testlerine donusum + CI'a Playwright entegrasyonu
branches.rationale: 13 E2E testi sadece heading kontrol ediyor ve CI'da HIC kosmuyor — cifte sahte yesil. Login bozuksa bile yesil. Gercek davranis (form->submit->redirect->guard) assert'i ve CI'a entegrasyon time-to-product'in 'gercekten calisiyor mu' garantisi.
tasks: 13 'heading visible' testini davranis testine cevir: login icin getByLabel().fill() -> button.click() -> expect(page).toHaveURL(redirect) + korumali sayfa erisimi assert
ci.yml'e 'e2e' job ekle (playwright install + pnpm dev webServer + playwright test) — su an Playwright CI'da HIC kosmuyor
auth-flow gercek senaryo: yanlis sifir -> hata mesaji gorunur; dogru giris -> dashboard redirect; guard: login'siz korumali route -> /auth/login redirect (AUTH'a bagimli)
E2E'yi mock-bagimli deterministik fixture ile tasarla; backend gelene kadar in-memory mock uzerinden davranis dogrula

branches.branch: B5 — eslint-plugin-bp self-test (RuleTester)
branches.rationale: bp-rule'lar tum turetilen projelerin kalite cekirdegi ve 0 testleri var; bir regex/AST hatasi (orn. no-hardcoded-color hex regex) sessizce tum gate'i etkisizlestirir. Kurallari error yapmadan once mantiklarini test ile kilitlemek zorunlu.
tasks: RuleTester kurulumu (vitest + eslint/RuleTester); 19 kural icin valid/invalid case matrisi

Once regex-yogun kurallari test et: no-hardcoded-color (hex/rgb/hsl/named + template literal + allowRgba option), no-direct-repo-import (path pattern + named export + usecase istisnasi), no-token-category-mismatch
ast-helpers.js ve token-whitelist.js util'leri icin birim test (isInsideAnimatedStyle, isExceptionFile, CSS_NAMED_COLORS)
Plugin testlerini CI test job'ina dahil et + coverage threshold uygula (kural mantigi %90+)

branches.branch: B6 — Scaffolding + upstream-sync smoke testleri (bats)
branches.rationale: Scaffolding urunun '0. dakika' deneyimi; create-project.sh sessizce kimlik literal'i (prefixes, boilerplate.app) birakirsa her turetilen proje bozulur ve hicbir test yakalamaz. upstream-sync drift mantigi var ama test ve bp-v* tag yoklugundan dogrulanamaz.
tasks: bats-core kurulumu; create-project.sh icin smoke test: gecici dizinde --skip-install calistir, ciktida kalan '@project/' ve 'boilerplate' literal'lerini ara (prefixes dahil)

create-project.sh verify fazini genislet: src/ icindeki 'boilerplate://' / 'boilerplate.app' deep-link literal'lerini ve AppNavigator prefixes'i yakalayacak grep ekle (kacirilan kanit: AppNavigator.tsx:192)
upstream-sync.sh icin bats: bp-v* tag yoklugunda anlamli hata, hash drift tespiti, expand_and_sync diff mantigi (mock manifest ile)
ci.yml veya scheduled-audit.yml'e 'scaffold-smoke' job ekle; bp-v* git tag stratejisini test edilebilir kil (UPSTREAM-SYNC temasi ile koordineli)

ubiquitous: The system SHALL run ESLint with --max-warnings 0 in the CI lint job so that no warning-level violation can merge to main.
The system SHALL enforce coverage thresholds in every package that ships runtime code, failing CI when measured coverage drops below the configured floor.
The system SHALL execute the eslint-plugin-bp rule test suite (RuleTester valid/invalid cases) as part of the CI test job.
The system SHALL run Playwright E2E tests in CI as a dedicated job (currently Playwright never runs in CI).
event: WHEN a pull request is opened or updated, the system SHALL run lint, typecheck, unit tests (with coverage), plugin self-tests, E2E behavior tests, and scaffolding smoke tests, and SHALL block merge if any gate fails.

WHEN create-project.sh completes a derivation, the verify phase SHALL scan src/ for residual 'boilerplate' identity literals including deep-link prefixes (boilerplate://, https://boilerplate.app) and SHALL exit non-zero if any remain.
WHEN an E2E login test runs, the system SHALL fill credentials, submit the form, and assert a post-login redirect via toHaveURL, NOT merely assert heading visibility.
state: WHILE the gradual warn->error migration is in progress, the system SHALL maintain a per-workspace warning baseline (--max-warnings <baseline>) and SHALL only allow the baseline to decrease, never increase.
WHILE coverage ratchet is active, the system SHALL use autoUpdate to raise thresholds toward measured coverage and SHALL never lower a previously achieved threshold.
optional: WHERE a package contains only configuration or generated artifacts (dist/**, *.config.*), the system SHALL exclude it from lint and coverage gates.
WHERE the bp-rule severity is being promoted, the system SHALL first reduce existing violations of that rule to zero before changing its severity from warn to error.
WHERE upstream-sync drift detection depends on bp-v* tags, the system SHALL fail with an actionable message when no bp-v* tag exists rather than silently no-op.
constraint: IF coverage threshold enforcement is requested THEN the system SHALL first install @vitest/coverage-v8 (currently absent from the lockfile), otherwise the coverage run fails to start.
IF any bp-rule is set to error THEN the system SHALL ensure recommended.js uses valid flat-config syntax (no 'plugins:[...]' array) so the config loads.
IF the mobile test script is gated THEN the system SHALL remove --passWithNoTests and create the missing src/test/setup.ts, otherwise jest passes deceptively or crashes on first real test.
IF an E2E test depends on authenticated state THEN the system SHALL provide a deterministic mock fixture until the real data layer exists (dependency on AUTH/API themes).

risks.risk: 146 warning + 29 error'u tek seferde error yapip --max-warnings 0 koymak CI'i aninda kilitler, time-to-product hedefini bozar.
risks.mitigation: Baseline-then-ratchet: ilk adimda --max-warnings'i mevcut sayiya esitle (web 56/mobile 52/ui 38), yeni ihlali engelle, eski ihlali faz faz dusur. bp-rule severity'yi dizin/paket bazli kademeli error yap.

risks.risk: Coverage threshold cok yuksek baslarsa (orn. lines 80%) mevcut 7 web testi + 0 core/mobile testi ile CI hemen kirar.
risks.mitigation: Once @vitest/coverage-v8 kur, gercek baseline'i olc, threshold'u olculen degerin hemen altina koy, autoUpdate ile yalniz-yukari ratchet uygula. core/mobile icin once karakterizasyon testi yaz sonra threshold.

risks.risk: E2E davranis testleri %100 in-memory mock'a bagimli; gercek login/redirect mock olmadan dogrulanamaz -> AUTH/API temalarina sert bagimlilik.
risks.mitigation: E2E'yi deterministik mock fixture uzerine kur; mock seviyesinde bile 'form doldur->submit->URL degisti->korumali sayfa goruntulendi' assert'i mevcut heading-visible'dan degerli. Gercek backend gelince fixture'i degistir.

risks.risk: recommended.js flat-config'de gecersiz 'plugins:[...]' array sozdizimi iceriyor; oldugu gibi extend edilirse ESLint config yuklemesi patlar.
risks.mitigation: recommended.js'i once duzelt (sadece rules birak veya flat-config plugin objesi referansi), eslint.config.js bunu spread ederek tek-kaynak severity yonetimi saglasin.

risks.risk: bats CI'a ek kurulum (apt/brew bats-core) ve yavas bash testleri getirir; macOS/Linux CI farkliligi.
risks.mitigation: bats job'ini ayri/opsiyonel tut, sadece tooling/ degisikliklerinde tetikle (paths filter). Smoke testleri --skip-install ile hizli tut.

risks.risk: Scaffolding verify'i sadece sabit dosya listesini tariyor; yeni eklenen kimlik literal'leri (gelecekteki deep-link, app.json alanlari) sessizce kacar.
risks.mitigation: verify'i sabit-liste yerine src/ + apps/ geneli recursive grep'e cevir (allowlist ile yanlis-pozitif yonet); prefixes ve boilerplate.app icin acik regex testi ekle (bats ile kilitle).

risks.risk: Mobil jest setup eksik (src/test/setup.ts yok); --passWithNoTests kaldirilirsa ilk test eklendiginde jest patlar.
risks.mitigation: Once src/test/setup.ts olustur (jest-expo + RN testing-library matchers), bir smoke test ekle, sonra --passWithNoTests'i kaldir ve coverageThreshold tanimla.

dependencies: AUTH temasi: E2E login/redirect/guard davranis testleri gercek auth wiring'e (AuthProvider, router guard) ve checkSession/useAuth fan_in>0 olmasina bagimli. Mock fixture ile kismi izole edilebilir ama tam dogrulama AUTH'a bagli.
API/Veri katmani temasi: E2E ve coverage anlamli olmasi icin in-memory mock yerine deterministik fixture/MSW gerekir; mock reset davranisi son commit'te eklenmis (4b2f984).
UPSTREAM-SYNC/Versiyonlama temasi: upstream-sync bats testleri bp-v* git tag stratejisine bagimli (su an 0 tag); drift detection tag olmadan calistirilamaz.

Cross-platform/UI temasi: bp-rule'larin error'a cikmasi (no-raw-pressable, require-accessibility-props, no-hardcoded-*) packages/ui'nin RN'e tasinmasi ve hardcoded var(--color) temizligi ile cakisir; severity sertlestirmesi UI refactor'u ile koordine olmali yoksa CI kilitlenir.
Scaffolding/derive temasi: create-project.sh verify genislemesi (prefixes/deep-link rename) bu temanin smoke testleriyle ayni dosyalara dokunur — ortak sahiplik.

referenceImplementations.pattern: sed -i.bak BSD/GNU-uyumlu in-place edit (doğru taşınabilirlik deseni)
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: create-project.sh sed kullanımı zaten .bak suffix ile BSD-safe; aynı disiplin grep -oP yerine de uygulanmalı. Doğru taşınabilirlik referansı olarak kullanılabilir.

referenceImplementations.pattern: 3-way merge (base/ours/theirs) ile derived değişikliklerini koruyan exact sync
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Sync motoru sağlam yazılmış; sorun yalnız base'i besleyen CURRENT_HASH okumasının (grep -oP) BSD'de boş dönmesi. Bu fonksiyon korunmalı, sadece hash okuma kaynağı düzeltilmeli.

referenceImplementations.pattern: jq ile package.json scope rename (tutarlı, taşınabilir JSON dönüşümü)
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: jq tabanlı dönüşüm doğru tercih; aynı disiplin app.json (:191-209) için de uygulanmış. Yeni literal rename adımları da bu jq/sed ayrımına uymalı (JSON → jq, metin → sed).

referenceImplementations.pattern: severity hesaplama (MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH → P0/P1/INFO) tag kategorizasyonu
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Release workflow yazılırken aynı semantic mapping baz alınmalı; notify zaten bu kategoriyi tüketiyor, release tarafı tag mesajını bu formatta üretmeli (annotated tag, 'Zorunlu/Yapısal/Felsefi' prefix).

referenceImplementations.pattern: manifest-driven sync (tek source-of-truth YAML)
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: Drift detection ve sync aynı manifest'i okur; CI dosya yolu uyumsuzluğu (tooling/ci vs .github/workflows) bu manifest'te düzeltilmeli, yeni release workflow da manifest'e entry olarak eklenmeli.

externalPatterns.approach: GNU coreutils zorunluluğunu kaldırmak: grep -oP yerine sed/awk veya POSIX grep -oE kullanmak
externalPatterns.source: POSIX grep/sed taşınabilirlik (BSD vs GNU); macOS varsayılan BSD grep -P/--perl-regexp desteklemez
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Artı: macOS+Linux her ikisinde çalışır, ek bağımlılık yok. Eksi: lookbehind/lookahead kaybı, regex biraz daha uzun. Bu proje için ZORUNLU çünkü türetme macOS geliştirici makinesinde de koşacak (alp'in ortamı darwin).

externalPatterns.approach: Bağımsız standalone release script (tooling/release/create-tag.sh) + workflow_dispatch ile GitHub Actions tag push
externalPatterns.source: git annotated tag + GitHub Actions release pattern (softprops/action-gh-release veya doğrudan git tag push)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Artı: tag oluşturma idempotent, changelog'dan otomatik mesaj çekme, notify workflow'unu tetikler. Eksi: CROSS_REPO_TOKEN secret yönetimi gerekir. Lokal script + CI hibrit (script tag üretir, push CI'yı tetikler) bu projeye en uygun.

externalPatterns.approach: degit/giget tarzı 'history-free' türetme (git history sıfırlama)
externalPatterns.source: degit (Rich Harris) / giget — boilerplate türetmede de-facto standart: .git'i atıp temiz init yapar
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Artı: derived proje temiz history ile başlar, upstream sync 'unrelated histories' sorunundan etkilenmez (49-strategy.md:156 zaten bunu varsayıyor). Eksi: blame/geçmiş kaybı. --reset-git opt-in flag olarak eklenmeli (varsayılan kapalı, çünkü bazı ekipler history ister).

externalPatterns.approach: Bundle ID / scope / slug için katı regex validasyonu
externalPatterns.source: Apple bundle ID (reverse-DNS, ^[A-Za-z0-9.-]+$), npm scope (^@[a-z0-9-~][a-z0-9-._~]*$), Expo slug (^[a-z0-9-]+$) konvansiyonları
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Artı: EAS/App Store reddini türetme anında yakalar, geç hata maliyetini sıfırlar. Eksi: çok katı regex meşru kenar durumları (örn underscore) bloklayabilir. context7 ile Expo app config + npm package.json name kuralları doğrulanmalı.

externalPatterns.approach: sentinel-based partial merge yerine başlık-tabanlı (heading-anchored) section merge
externalPatterns.source: Mevcut partial-merge.sh sentinel yaklaşımı vs Markdown H2 başlık sınırlı merge
externalPatterns.tradeoff: Artı: CLAUDE.md sentinel içermediği için (0 adet) mevcut partial-merge çalışmıyor; ya CLAUDE.md'ye sentinel eklenmeli ya da heading-based merge'e geçilmeli. Sentinel eklemek daha az riskli ve mevcut motoru korur — heading-based merge yeni parser riski getirir.

ubiquitous: The system SHALL replace all 'boilerplate' and '@project/' literals across config files, source code (deep-link prefixes, i18n locales, screen text), and documentation during derivation.
The system SHALL validate NAME, SCOPE, BUNDLE_ID, and DOMAIN parameters against format regexes before performing any file mutation.
The system SHALL use BSD/GNU-portable shell constructs (POSIX grep -oE / sed -nE, sed -i.bak) in all derivation and sync scripts.
event: WHEN a new bp-v* annotated tag is pushed, the system SHALL trigger notify-derived-projects.yml to open sync issues in listed derived projects.
WHEN the release workflow runs, the system SHALL create an annotated bp-v* tag with a category-prefixed message derived from the latest CHANGELOG.md entry.
WHEN derivation completes the verify phase, the system SHALL scan apps/*/src and packages/*/src for residual 'boilerplate' literals (excluding dist/node_modules) and fail verification if any remain.
WHEN a CLAUDE.md identity-replacement target string is not found, the system SHALL emit a warning instead of silently no-op'ing.
state: WHILE the upstream remote is configured and a target bp-v* tag exists, the system SHALL perform 3-way merge sync reading the prior hash from BOUNDARY.md via a portable parser.
WHILE no bp-v* tag exists in the repository, the system SHALL block upstream-sync.sh with a clear 'baseline tag missing' error and guidance to create bp-v1.0.0.
optional: WHERE the --reset-git flag is provided, the system SHALL reinitialize git history with a single initial commit and re-add the upstream remote.
WHERE the --upstream-url flag is provided, the system SHALL add the upstream remote and fetch bp-v* tags.
WHERE yq is unavailable, the system SHALL fall back to portable grep/sed for .sync-config.yaml variable extraction.
constraint: IF a parameter fails its format regex THEN the system SHALL reject derivation with a specific error before mutating any file.
IF CLAUDE.md lacks UPSTREAM-SYNC sentinels THEN the system SHALL either skip it explicitly (logged) or apply sentinel-aware merge, never silently drop the file.
IF grep -P is unsupported on the host (BSD) THEN the system SHALL still extract the upstream hash correctly via the portable fallback.
IF a CHANGELOG.md entry is missing for the target version THEN the release workflow SHALL fail before creating the tag.
The system SHALL NOT emit emoji in any workflow output or issue body (project [HARD] no-emoji rule).

risks.risk: Kapsamlı literal rename meşru 'boilerplate' referanslarını da (örn upstream sync doküman yolları, governance dosya adları, BOUNDARY.md 'Boilerplate ile ilişki' başlıkları) yanlışlıkla değiştirebilir.

risks.risk: bp-v1.0.0 baseline tag mevcut HEAD'e atılırsa, baseline'dan ÖNCEKI commit'ler sync edilemez; yanlış commit'e atılırsa 3-way merge base'i bozulur.
risks.mitigation: Tag'i bilinçli olarak 'stable' kabul edilen commit'e at; tag mesajında baseline tarihini ve kapsamı belgele. Tag oluşturmayı idempotent yap (zaten varsa hata verme, doğrula).

risks.risk: Parametre regex'leri çok katı olursa meşru kenar durumları (underscore içeren bundle segment, tek-segment scope) bloklar; çok gevşek olursa EAS/npm reddini geçirir.

risks.risk: --reset-git history'yi geri dönüşsüz siler; yanlış kullanımda boilerplate katkı geçmişi tamamen kaybolur.

risks.risk: grep -oP → sed dönüşümü regex semantiğini değiştirirse hash okuma sessizce yanlış değer döndürebilir (boş yerine kısmi eşleşme).
risks.mitigation: Dönüşüm sonrası birim test: bilinen BOUNDARY.md içeriğiyle sed çıktısını doğrula. macOS + Linux'ta her iki ortamda manuel test. Çıktı boşsa fail-loud (FULL_SYNC'e sessiz düşme yerine uyarı).

risks.risk: CLAUDE.md sentinel eklenmesi mevcut MoAI-ADK içeriğini bölümlere ayırma gerektirir; yanlış sentinel yerleşimi sync sırasında içerik kaybına yol açar.

referenceImplementations.pattern: create-project.sh scope/literal rename motoru
referenceImplementations.whyRelevant: B5'teki .codex hardcoded-path fix'i ve uc-agac senkron dogrulamasi buraya eklenmeli. Mevcut script @project/ ve boilerplate:// literal'lerini rename ediyor ama .codex/hooks.json absolute path'lerini ve .agents/.codex guardrail senkronunu ele almiyor (kanit: grep .codex = 0).

externalPatterns.approach: Tek AI-instruction kaynagi + sembolik link / generate-step ile coklu arac dosyasi (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules) turetme
externalPatterns.source: agentskills.io / AGENTS.md acik standardi + yaygin monorepo pratigi (Cursor/Claude/Codex coklu-arac senkronu)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: tek-kaynak, drift imkansiz, parite garantili. EKSI: build-step bagimliligi, symlink Windows/git'te zahmetli olabilir. Bu projeye uygun: 7 guardrail skill'i + CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md guardrail bloglari icin idealdir cunku icerik birebir ayni olmali. Alternatif (her dosyayi elle senkron) REDDEDILDI: zaten 2 yerde drift baslamis (.codex bos, .agents farkli skill seti).

externalPatterns.approach: Markdown link/freshness CI yerine yapilandirilmis frontmatter + git-mtime drift kontrolu
externalPatterns.source: Mevcut scheduled-audit.yml doc-freshness deseni + git log -1 --format mtime yaklasimi
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: doc 47 §15'in karmasik issue-acma mekanizmasindan cok daha basit, mevcut CI'a minimal ekleme. EKSI: issue otomatik acilmaz, sadece CI uyarisi. Bu projeye uygun: hizi koruma temasi icin 'minimal calisir otomasyon > vaat edilmis karmasik otomasyon' dogru takas. Tam §15 implementasyonu (kaynak+versiyon comment + bagimli-guardrail-tespiti + 30-gun-Major) REDDEDILEBILIR cunku bakim maliyeti hiz uretmiyor.

externalPatterns.approach: Progressive disclosure / lazy-load (disable-model-invocation:true, user-invocable:false) ile metadata yuku dusurme
externalPatterns.source: .claude/rules/moai/development/skill-authoring.md (Skill Invocation Control tablosu) + Claude Code native progressive disclosure
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: kullanilmayan 47 MoAI skill'inin oturum-basi metadata yukunu (Level 1 ~100 token/skill) sifirlamadan dusurmek mumkun. EKSI: tamamen disable etmek MoAI'yi gelecekte kullanmayi zorlastirir. Bu projeye uygun: B6'da MoAI 'kullanilacaksa lazy-load, kullanilmayacaksa arsivle' karar agacini destekler.

externalPatterns.approach: Threshold-table driven proportional enforcement (gorev karmasikligi -> kontrol derinligi)
externalPatterns.source: Proje ici doc 40 satir 914/1017 esik tablosu (zaten tanimli ama operasyonel degil)
externalPatterns.tradeoff: ARTI: prensip zaten projede mevcut, sadece guardrail-check skill'ine baglanmasi gerekiyor — yeni kavram getirmez, tutarlilik artar. EKSI: 'trivial' siniri subjektif olabilir, yanlis siniflandirma ile guardrail atlanabilir. Azaltma: secure/auth/payment dosyalarini her zaman tam-kontrol white-list'ine al.

ubiquitous: The system SHALL keep every domain guardrail document at or below 150 lines and every activity guardrail at or below 100 lines (doc 47 §5.1, doc 41 satir 135).
The system SHALL maintain a single source of truth for the 7 guardrail skills shared across .claude and .agents trees, deriving copies rather than hand-syncing them.
The system SHALL expose a guardrail compliance protocol of at most 30 lines in CLAUDE.md mirroring the AGENTS.md guardrail compliance block (parite).
event: WHEN a coding task starts, the system SHALL first classify change scope (trivial / small / feature) and select guardrail reading depth accordingly before any domain document is read.
WHEN a coding task is classified trivial (single-line, typo, comment, import-order, string-value), the system SHALL skip activity/domain guardrail reading and only recall universal rules.
WHEN a source document tracked by a guardrail changes, the CI SHALL flag the dependent guardrail as potentially stale (warning-only, no auto-issue).
WHEN create-project.sh derives a new project, the system SHALL rewrite all absolute paths in .codex/hooks.json to project-relative form.
state: WHILE more than 4 domain guardrails are triggered for a single task, the system SHALL prune to a maximum of 1 activity + 4 domains using priority order (D-SEC > D-A11 > activity-nearest).
WHILE MoAI-ADK has produced zero SPEC documents (.moai/specs absent), the system SHALL load MoAI-* skills lazily (metadata-suppressed) rather than as always-on session context.
optional: WHERE a changed file path matches auth/payment/security patterns, the system SHALL always perform full guardrail reading regardless of change-scope classification.
WHERE the drift-automation promised in doc 47 §15 is not implemented, the system SHALL either implement a minimal git-mtime drift check or remove the §15 promise from the document.
constraint: IF CLAUDE.md exceeds 500 lines THEN the system SHALL block merge and require refactor to pointer-references (doc 41 satir 90).
IF a domain guardrail exceeds 150 lines THEN the CI guardrail-budget job SHALL fail.
IF .codex/hooks.json contains a hardcoded absolute path THEN the derive verification SHALL fail.
IF a guardrail skill differs between .claude and .agents trees THEN the sync verification SHALL fail (single-source invariant).

risks.risk: Trivial-skip esigi (B1) cok genis tutulursa gercek ihlaller (orn. yeni component'te a11y eksikligi) guardrail-check atlanip kaciriilir.
risks.mitigation: post-edit-guardrail.sh ZATEN calisiyor (grep-bazli, her Edit/Write'ta) — skill atlansa bile hook ikinci savunma hatti olarak ihlal taramasi yapar. Ayrica auth/payment/security path'lerini her-zaman-tam-kontrol white-list'ine al (EARS optional kurali).

risks.risk: 8 domain dosyasini 150 satira cekerken (B2) kritik kural icerigi kaybedilebilir veya kaynak dokumana tasinirken baglam kopabilir.
risks.mitigation: Sadece narratif/aciklama/ornek ayikla; direktiflerin TAMAMI guardrail'de kalsin (doc 47 §5.1 'yalnizca direktifler'). Tasinan icerik kaynak dokumana git, guardrail'de '[detay icin: 22-design-tokens-spec.md]' pointer'i birak. Diff'i guardrail-audit ile dogrula.

risks.risk: CLAUDE.md guardrail blogu (B3) eklenirken 672->daha buyuk olup 500 limitini daha cok asabilir.
risks.mitigation: B3 ZATEN CLAUDE.md'yi 500 alti hedefliyor: MoAI Execution Directive detay bolumlerini .claude/rules/ pointer'larina cevir (cogu zaten orada mevcut). Net etki: -200 satir MoAI detay + 70 satir cekirdek/guardrail = toplam dusus.

risks.risk: Uc-agac symlink/build-step (B5) git'te veya Windows derived projelerde bozulabilir; .codex hardcoded path fix'i yanlis yapilirsa Codex hook'lari sessizce calismaz.
risks.mitigation: symlink yerine create-project.sh icinde generate-step (kopyala + path-rewrite) tercih et (Windows-safe). .codex path fix'ini $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR ile yap (hooks-system.md path syntax kuralina uygun). Fix sonrasi 'codex hook calisiyor mu' dogrulamasi create-project.sh verify fazina ekle.

risks.risk: Drift otomasyonunu SILMEK (B4) ileride kaynak-guardrail sapmasini gozden kacirir; IMPLEMENTE etmek bakim yuku getirir (tema: hizi koruma).
risks.mitigation: Orta yol: karmasik §15.1-15.3 issue-acma mekanizmasini sil, yerine scheduled-audit.yml'e tek basit git-mtime karsilastirmasi (uyari-only) ekle. Boylece sapma gorunur kalir ama otomasyon bakim maliyeti minimal.

risks.risk: MoAI-ADK'yi arsivlemek/lazy-load etmek (B6), proje sahibinin gelecekte MoAI workflow kullanma niyetini engelleyebilir.
risks.mitigation: Once AskUserQuestion ile niyet teyit edilmeli (bu research kararinda degil, SPEC oncesi). Lazy-load (disable-model-invocation:true) tamamen-silmeden geri-donulebilir; arsivleme oncesi .moai-backups'a tasi.

risks.risk: Bu tema (Faz 4) hiz-uretmeyen agirligi azaltmayi hedefliyor ama yanlis kesim TRUST5/guardrail enforcement'i zayiflatip kalite borcu yaratabilir.
risks.mitigation: Enforcement KATMANINI (post-edit hook) koru, sadece OKUMA-BUTCESINI (guardrail-check skill agirligi) ve OLU OTOMASYON vaatlerini (doc 47 §15) kes. Enforcement != metadata yuku ayrimi her dalda korunmali.

dependencies: Tema-CrossPlatform (packages/ui RN'e tasinma): guardrail-check'in *.tsx icin onerdigi domain seti (D-UIX/D-DSY/D-A11/D-PLT) cross-platform component'lerde .native/.web split ile birlikte yeniden degerlendirilmeli; D-PLT guardrail RN tarafi netlesince guncellenecek.

Tema-Enforcement (eslint warn->error, CI --max-warnings 0, coverage threshold): B2'deki guardrail-budget CI job'i ve B4 drift kontrolu, ayni CI sertlestirme temasinin parcasi — birlikte tasarlanmali ki CI job sayisi/suresi kontrol altinda kalsin.

Tema-Derive (create-project.sh rename eksikleri, AppNavigator prefixes, verify src/ taramiyor): B5'teki .codex hardcoded-path fix'i ve uc-agac senkron dogrulamasi DOGRUDAN bu temanin create-project.sh duzeltmeleriyle ayni dosyada cakisir — koordine edilmeli (ayni dosya, write-conflict riski).

Tema-UpstreamSync (bp-v tag yoklugu, upstream-sync.sh/BOUNDARY versiyonlama): B4 drift ve B5 manifest genisletme, upstream-sync-manifest.yaml ve upstream-sync.sh'i paylasiyor; tag mekanizmasi olusunca guardrail drift'i hash-diff ile baglanabilir.

docs/governance/47, docs/governance/41, docs/governance/40: B1/B2/B3/B4 bu uc dokumanin kurallarini (150-satir, CLAUDE.md anatomi, orantililik, §15 otomasyon) ya implemente eder ya da revize eder — dokuman guncellemesi SPEC kapsaminda olmali.
AGENTS.md guardrail blogu (satir 102-148): B3 CLAUDE.md parite blogu bununla senkron tutulmali; AGENTS.md UPSTREAM-SYNC sentinel'leri partial-merge.sh ile uyumlu kalmali.
researches.title: Governance/metadata yukunu makullestir (hizi koruma)

crossPlatformDecision.direction: Yol B — RN-native primitive seti + .native.tsx/.web.tsx platform-split (paylasilan .types.ts prop interface). react-native-web kopru (Yol A) REDDEDILDI.
crossPlatformDecision.rationale: Kanit: apps/web Tailwind CSS 4 KURULU ve calisir (apps/web/package.json:20 @tailwindcss/vite ^4.2.2, globals.css:1 @import 'tailwindcss'). react-native-web (Yol A) secilirse StyleSheet paradigmasi bu calisan web stack'i ile fiilen cakisir (ADR-007 web=Tailwind kararini bozar), web bundle'a ~100KB+ runtime girer ve 28 mevcut web sayfasi re-test gerektirir — yuksek regresyon riski, sifir kazanc. Yol B'de web OLDUGU GIBI kalir (CSS variable + Tailwind), mobil tarafa RN primitive (View/Text/Pressable) eklenir, ayni semantic token (packages/design-tokens SemanticTokenSet, fan_in=5) iki platformda farkli TUKETIM ile (web: var(--color) / mobil: useTheme().tokens JS-objesi veya NativeWind stabil olunca className) okunur. Primitive katmaninda (12 adet) platform-split FIZIKSEL olarak zorunlu (div vs View, button vs Pressable); component katmaninda (53 adet) cogu primitive kompozisyonu oldugu icin primitive'e indirgenince tek dosya kalabilir. Kanit dogrulandi: Pressable.tsx:4 ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>+<button> (web-only), 241 var(--color) occurrence / 63 dosya, packages/ui'da 0 .native/.web split, react-native import=0. NativeWind v5 JUNE 2026'da hala pre-release ve sadece Expo SDK 54 dogrulanmis (proje SDK 55) — ADR-007 Section 43 gate KARSILANMIYOR, bu yuzden ilk asamada JS-token consumption (nativewindStrategy.ts getThemeTokens fallback hazir, PDR-001), NativeWind stabil olunca opsiyonel migrate.

specCandidates.title: Mobil runtime bootstrap: babel/metro config + asset + bootstrap orchestration + native sinir netlestirme
scope: apps/mobile/babel.config.js olustur (babel-preset-expo + react-native-worklets/plugin EN SON, api.cache(true)) — Reanimated 4 worklet zinciri icin zorunlu
apps/mobile/metro.config.js olustur (expo/metro-config getDefaultConfig(__dirname) + pnpm monorepo watchFolders/nodeModulesPaths)
assets/ placeholder seti (icon.png 1024, splash.png, adaptive-icon.png) — app.json referanslari su an olu
Bootstrap orchestration: olu init fonksiyonlarini wire et (initSentry -> await initEncryptedStorage -> setupOfflineQueue), App.tsx'i GestureHandlerRootView ile sar, expo-constants'i dependency'e ekle
Native entegrasyon sinir netlestirme: sentry/push/IAP/netinfo icin 'kurulu/kurulu-degil + no-op abstraction' net karari (conditional-require deseni, sentry.ts altin sablon)
Hermes dogrulamasi (global.HermesInternal) + ADR-018 bootstrap dogrulama kapisi (expo-doctor temiz + dev build crash-free)
src/test/setup.ts olustur (jest.config.js:10 olmayan dosyaya isaret ediyor) + 1 smoke test
outOfScope: 27 mobil ekranin RN'e port edilmesi (SPEC-UI-001 kapsami — ekranlar @project/ui web-only primitive import ettigi icin Hermes'te crash eder)
Magaza submit / EAS production build (yalniz LOCAL boot ve dev build garanti edilir)
NativeWind kurulumu (stabil degil, SPEC-UI-001'de JS-token fallback ile ele alinir)
Auth wiring (SPEC-AUTH-001)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL include a babel.config.js using babel-preset-expo with react-native-worklets/plugin as the LAST plugin (Reanimated 4.x line, not the renamed react-native-reanimated/plugin).
The system SHALL include a metro.config.js extending expo/metro-config getDefaultConfig(__dirname) with pnpm monorepo watchFolders so @project/ui and @project/design-tokens are transformed.

WHEN the app entry point mounts, the system SHALL execute initSentry then AWAIT initEncryptedStorage then setupOfflineQueue before rendering interactive screens (encrypted MMKV silently no-ops if not awaited).
IF the bootstrap verification gate fails (expo-doctor errors, dev build crash, or global.HermesInternal undefined) THEN the mobile foundation SHALL NOT be considered ready (ADR-018 14.2).
The system SHALL declare every imported native package (including expo-constants used in sentry.ts:192) in apps/mobile/package.json dependencies.
acceptanceHighlights: Given proje apps/mobile dizini, When 'npx expo start --clear' calistirilir, Then Metro worklet/resolution hatasi olmadan basarili bundle uretir.
Given native dep audit, When 'npx expo-doctor' calistirilir, Then sifir New Architecture uyumsuzluk hatasi raporlanir.
Given uygulama dev build, When acilir, Then encrypted storage gercekten init olmus (await edilmis) ve global.HermesInternal tanimli.

specCandidates.title: Turetme ve yasam dongusu: kapsamli literal rename + bp-v baseline tag/release + parametre validasyonu + BSD/GNU tasinabilirlik
scope: create-project.sh kapsamli literal rename: AppNavigator.tsx:192 deep-link prefix ('boilerplate://' -> scheme), i18n locale display-name (en/tr common+shell), SplashScreen/AboutScreen ekran metni
Faz 6 verify genisletme: apps/*/src + packages/*/src recursive grep ile kalan 'boilerplate' literal tespiti (dist/node_modules haric, whitelist ile)
bp-v1.0.0 baseline annotated tag + tooling/release/create-release.sh standalone script + release.yml workflow (tag uretici, notify-derived-projects.yml'i tetikler)
Parametre format validasyonu: NAME/SCOPE/BUNDLE_ID/DOMAIN regex guard (Expo slug + npm scope + reverse-DNS + FQDN), dosya mutasyonundan ONCE
BSD/GNU tasinabilirlik: upstream-sync.sh:79-80 ve scheduled-audit.yml:229 grep -oP (GNU-only) -> sed -nE (macOS darwin'de bos donuyor -> her sync FULL_SYNC'e dusuyor)
CLAUDE.md sentinel/format uyumu: create-project.sh:379-398 eski boilerplate format ariyor (sessiz no-op), MoAI format basligina gore guncelle veya manifest'te exact-skip
--reset-git opt-in flag (git history reset) + .codex/hooks.json hardcoded absolute path fix (DOGRULANDI: /Users/alperenkarip iceriyor, derived projede kirilir)
notify-derived-projects.yml emoji (ℹ️ ⚠️) -> duz metin ([INFO]/[UYARI]), [HARD] emoji yasagi
outOfScope: upstream-sync 3-way merge motorunun yeniden yazilmasi (motor saglam, sadece hash okuma kaynagini duzelt)
Guardrail drift otomasyonu implementasyonu (SPEC-REFACTOR-GOV-001 kapsami)
Magaza/CI deploy entegrasyonu (SPEC-DEPLOY-001)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL replace all 'boilerplate' and '@project/' literals across config, source (deep-link prefixes, i18n locales, screen text) and rewrite absolute paths in .codex/hooks.json to project-relative form during derivation.
The system SHALL validate NAME/SCOPE/BUNDLE_ID/DOMAIN against format regexes BEFORE any file mutation; IF a parameter fails its regex THEN derivation SHALL be rejected with a specific error.
The system SHALL use BSD/GNU-portable shell constructs (sed -nE / grep -oE, sed -i.bak); IF grep -P is unsupported on the host (BSD/darwin) THEN the upstream hash SHALL still be extracted correctly.
WHEN the release workflow runs, the system SHALL create an annotated bp-v* tag from the latest CHANGELOG.md entry; IF a CHANGELOG entry is missing THEN the workflow SHALL fail before tagging.
WHILE no bp-v* tag exists, upstream-sync.sh SHALL block with a clear 'baseline tag missing' error rather than silently no-op. The system SHALL NOT emit emoji in any workflow output or issue body.
acceptanceHighlights: Given turetilen yeni proje, When create-project.sh tamamlanir ve verify calisir, Then apps/*/src + packages/*/src icinde kalan 'boilerplate' literal (deep-link prefix dahil) yoksa verify PASS.
Given gecersiz BUNDLE_ID (bosluk/buyuk harf), When create-project.sh cagrilir, Then hicbir dosya yazilmadan format hatasiyla reddedilir.
Given macOS darwin ortami, When upstream-sync.sh calisir, Then BOUNDARY.md'den CURRENT_HASH dogru okunur ve 3-way merge base korunur (FULL_SYNC'e dusmez).

specCandidates.title: GERCEK cross-platform UI (Yol B): platform-split primitive + design-tokens JS-token baglama + 27 mobil ekran port
scope: Yol B karari resmilestirme: 12 primitive icin .native.tsx/.web.tsx split + paylasilan .types.ts prop interface (web Tailwind/CSS-var korunur, mobil RN primitive eklenir)
design-tokens -> web CSS uretimini build'e bagla: theme.css.ts/generateCSSVariables ile globals.css URET (elle hex kopyasini sil) — single-source-of-truth onar (su an iki kopya)
241 var(--color) occurrence kademeli migrate: pilot 3-4 primitive (en yuksek fan_in: Stack/Text/Button/Box) once useTheme().tokens / className'e gecir, sonra 53 component katmani

27 mobil ekran port (kademeli): once 3 altin sablon (LoginScreen/HomeScreen/SettingsScreen), sonra 24 ekran — onChange->onChangeText, e.target.value->value, onClick->onPress (9 ekran web-event tasiyor)

eslint-plugin-bp RN kurallarini (no-raw-pressable/no-raw-rn-text/require-design-token) yeni mimaride aktif/anlamli hale getir, no-hardcoded-color/no-html-element-in-ui-package kademeli 'warn'->'error'
react-native-web'i SADECE Storybook icin (production web'de degil) degerlendir — A yolu olarak reddedildi
outOfScope: NativeWind v5 production adopsiyonu (pre-release, SDK 55 dogrulanmamis — ADR-007 Section 43 gate karsilanana kadar JS-token fallback, PDR-001)
Mobil babel/metro/asset bootstrap (SPEC-MOBILE-001 on-kosul)
Auth/Sample ekran is-mantigi wiring (SPEC-AUTH-001/SPEC-API-001 contract'larina baglanir)
semantic token sekil degisikligi (SemanticTokenSet stabil tutulur, fan_in=5)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL expose a single primitive API from @project/ui that resolves to platform-correct implementations (DOM on web via .web.tsx, React Native primitives on native via .native.tsx) sharing a typed .types.ts prop interface so the two cannot drift.

The system SHALL derive web CSS custom properties from @project/design-tokens (generateCSSVariables) at build time; no component SHALL contain hardcoded hex/CSS-variable string literals (241 var(--color) occurrences migrated).
WHEN a mobile screen imports a UI primitive (Stack/Text/Pressable/Button), the system SHALL render a React Native node that mounts without runtime error under Expo SDK 55.
IF react-native-web is proposed as the bridge THEN the system SHALL reject it (conflicts with the existing Tailwind CSS 4 web runtime, ADR-007 web=Tailwind).
IF a mobile screen uses web event semantics (onChange + e.target.value, onClick) THEN it SHALL be converted to native semantics (onChangeText/value, onPress) before being considered ported.
WHILE NativeWind v5 remains pre-release and unvalidated against Expo SDK 55, the system SHALL use the JS-token fallback (PDR-001) and SHALL NOT adopt it as the mobile styling runtime.
acceptanceHighlights: Given mobil uygulama (SPEC-MOBILE-001 ile boot eden), When bir ekran @project/ui primitive'i kullanir, Then RN node render eder ve Hermes'te crash etmez.
Given web uygulamasi, When SPEC-UI-001 tamamlanir, Then 28 mevcut web sayfasi Tailwind/CSS-variable ile DEGISMEDEN calismaya devam eder (sifir web regresyonu).
Given globals.css, When build calisir, Then generateCSSVariables'tan URETILIR ve lightTheme/globals.css ikiliği ortadan kalkar (tek kaynak).

specCandidates.title: Backend-agnostik veri katmani: ortak HTTP client canlandirma + MSW gomulu mock + Vite proxy mock-to-real kopru + cross-platform contract
scope: packages/core createApiClient'i canlandir (su an fan_in=0): test dosyasi yaz (client.ts:6 @MX:TODO kapat), session.ts ham fetch'i + sample api.ts in-memory mock'u core client'a tasi (tek transport noktasi, ADR-005 'raw fetch dagilmaz')

MSW gomulu mock backend (web+test+storybook): tek handlers.ts (/api/auth/* + sample CRUD), public/mockServiceWorker.js, browser.ts setupWorker + server.ts setupServer, fixture'lar (basari/bos/401/500/gecikme)
Vite dev proxy + mock-to-real env kopru: vite.config.ts server.proxy ('/api' -> VITE_API_BASE_URL), VITE_API_MOCKING bayragi, kosullu worker.start()
Cross-platform contract paylasimi (packages/core): SampleItem tipi + query-key factory + ADR-005 staleTime tablosu sabitleri, mobil duplicate SampleItem kaldir
Mobil mock stratejisi: core client'a injectable fetch ile packages/core/mocks/fixtures paylas (RN'de MSW native interception olgun degil), mobil sample ekranlari hooks'a bagla
Enforcement: no-raw-fetch-in-component lint kurali + MSW handler Zod-uyum contract-test
outOfScope: Gercek backend implementasyonu (boilerplate 'kendi backend'ini getir' varsayar; sadece mock + wire-up noktasi)
Auth state machine / AuthProvider (SPEC-AUTH-001 — bu SPEC sadece /api/auth/* MSW handler ve transport saglar)
Query-options factory tam soyutlamasi (erken soyutlama riski; once minimal sample+auth query-key, ikinci feature gelince genislet)
Mobil ekran UI portu (SPEC-UI-001)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL route all HTTP data access through the shared createApiClient in packages/core (no raw fetch in feature/screen components, ADR-005 Bolum 11/32).
The system SHALL define API mock behavior in a single shared handlers module serving as source of truth for browser, test, and Storybook (MSW v2).
WHEN VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled, the system SHALL register the MSW worker; WHILE disabled, the system SHALL forward /api/* through the Vite dev proxy to VITE_API_BASE_URL (real backend).

WHERE the platform is React Native, the system SHALL provide mock responses via core-client fetch injection sharing the same fixture data module (native service-worker interception not reliably supported).
IF the mock layer is replaced by a real backend THEN no consumer hook (useSampleItems/useSampleItem) or session boundary SHALL require changes (only the queryFn/transport binding changes).
acceptanceHighlights: Given dev server VITE_API_MOCKING=enabled, When /api/sample istegi atilir, Then MSW handler fixture cevabini network seviyesinde dondurur (kod degismeden).
Given test ortami, When sample CRUD veya auth istegi calisir, Then setupServer ile deterministik intercept edilir (canli backend gerekmez).
Given mutation basarili, When tamamlanir, Then etkilenen query key'ler invalidate edilir ve bagimli view guncellenir (ADR-005 Bolum 16).

specCandidates.title: Web auth dikey dilimini canlandir + pluggable auth/BaaS adaptoru + mobil auth wiring
scope: AuthProvider + context wiring (web): App.tsx'te QueryClientProvider ICINE/RouterProvider DISINA mount (su an sadece yorum satiri:7), useAuth state'ini context'e tasi, checkSession bootstrap tek yerde
Route guard + redirect: RequireAuth/PublicOnly guard, router.tsx protected '/' subtree'sini sar (su an korumasiz), logout sonrasi navigation reset (useAuth.ts:65-66 eksik), returnTo destegi

4 olu auth formunu canlandir (e.preventDefault kaldir): loginSchema/registerSchema Zod + useLogin/useRegister mutation (FormScreen altin sablonu), backend error -> sanitized i18n mesaj (ADR-010 error taxonomy)

Pluggable AuthAdapter: own-backend-cookie default impl (canonical, mevcut session.ts /api/auth/* genislet), Supabase/Clerk iskelet+dokumantasyon (basit DI, factory degil), onUnauthorized -> refresh/logout kanca

Mobil auth wiring: useAuth+Zustand store (token sadece SecureStore), RootNavigator flat->conditional gating, secureStorage.ts/biometric.ts tuketimi (hazir ama fan_in=0), LoginScreen.tsx:27 (e.target as any).value RN-bozuk duzelt
Logout teardown altin desenini KORU (queryClient.clear+state reset, L.1.5/L.1.7), auth observability privacy filtresi (token analytics/Sentry'ye sizmamali)
outOfScope: Backend auth endpoint implementasyonu (MSW /api/auth/* handler SPEC-API-001'den gelir)
Supabase/Clerk somut implementasyonu (sadece interface + dokumante genisletme noktasi; tek somut impl = own-backend, asiri soyutlama yasak ADR-010 36.1)
8-durumlu auth state machine (ADR-010 14.2 hedef; once mevcut 4-durum AuthStatus ile baslar)
BaaS localStorage token modeli adopsiyonu (ADR-010 8.1 HttpOnly tercihi korunur)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL expose auth state to the UI only as a sanitized AuthSummary (status/userId/displayName), never raw tokens, and SHALL route all auth operations through a single AuthAdapter boundary (UI SHALL NOT call provider SDKs directly).

The system SHALL provide a default own-backend HttpOnly-cookie AuthAdapter as the canonical baseline (ADR-010 Bolum 8); Supabase/Clerk remain documented pluggable extension points (no factory until a second concrete impl exists).

WHEN logout is triggered, the system SHALL call best-effort server logout then deterministically clear query cache, reset state, clear secure storage and reset navigation (wrong-user leak prevention, L.1.5/L.1.7).
WHILE auth status is unauthenticated/expired the system SHALL redirect protected routes to login; WHILE bootstrap (checkSession) is in progress it SHALL render a loading screen.

IF a network/offline error occurs during checkSession THEN the system SHALL return recoverable 'expired' (NOT 'unauthenticated') to avoid hard logout (session.ts:25-34 invariant). WHERE the platform is mobile, tokens SHALL persist exclusively in Expo SecureStore.
acceptanceHighlights: Given olu LoginPage, When kullanici gecerli kimlikle submit eder, Then AuthAdapter.login cagrilir, status 'authenticated' olur ve returnTo/home'a redirect edilir.
Given korumasiz protected route, When auth'suz erisilir, Then /auth/login'e redirect edilir (RequireAuth guard).
Given mobil RootNavigator, When uygulama acilir, Then auth-state-driven gating ile authenticated? Main : Auth secilir (flat render degil), token sadece SecureStore'dan okunur.

specCandidates.title: Uretime gecis: gercek web deploy + SPA fallback + cross-platform env sema (t3-env) + EAS paritesi + Turbo env
scope: Web deploy hedefi (host karari AskUserQuestion ile): deploy.yml:44 echo stub'i secilen host official action ile degistir (Vercel CLI-mode onerilen), preview/production environment + secret injection
SPA fallback / client-side routing rewrite: vercel.json rewrites VEYA netlify.toml/_redirects (su an HICBIRI yok -> /login deep-link static host'ta 404, uretim-blocker), asset cache header'lari

Cross-platform env sema (fail-fast): t3-env env-core ile web (VITE_) + mobil (EXPO_PUBLIC_) tek soyutlama, vite-env.d.ts typed ImportMetaEnv, build-time validation, VITE_API_BASE_URL wire-up NOKTASI (SPEC-API-001'e baglanir)
EAS mobil deploy gercek calisabilirligi: babel/metro/asset on-kosulu (SPEC-MOBILE-001'e bagimli), eas.json placeholder isaretleme, EAS env <-> GitHub secrets parite dokumantasyonu
Turbo env declaration: turbo.json build/typecheck task.env (VITE_*/EXPO_PUBLIC_*) -> cache hash dogrulugu (stale env build onleme)
deploy-CI-release zinciri + web deploy rollback runbook + repo-mode (bootstrap_ready) guard
outOfScope: Gercek API entegrasyonu (env sema sadece VITE_API_BASE_URL baglama NOKTASINI sabitler; tuketim SPEC-API-001)
Magaza submit/phased rollout (EAS build dry-run garanti, App Store submit kapsam disi)
bp-v* tag/release workflow (SPEC-INFRA-DERIVE-001 kapsami; deploy tetigi opsiyonel baglanir)
Belirli bir hosting vendor'una kilitlenme (adapter-agnostik: tek referans impl + placeholder)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL validate all environment variables against a typed schema at build time and fail the build when required variables are missing/invalid (fail-fast, t3-env web VITE_ + mobile EXPO_PUBLIC_).

The web application SHALL ship a host SPA-fallback configuration that rewrites all non-asset routes to /index.html; WHEN a deep-link route (/login) is requested on the deployed host, the system SHALL serve index.html with HTTP 200 instead of 404.
WHEN the web-production/preview deploy target is dispatched, the system SHALL build apps/web and deploy to the configured hosting target (not a stub echo).
IF apps/mobile lacks babel.config.js, metro.config.js, or app.json-referenced assets THEN the mobile EAS deploy SHALL be blocked with a clear precondition error (depends on SPEC-MOBILE-001).

WHILE building with Turborepo, the system SHALL include declared env variables in the cache hash so a build with different env values does not reuse a stale cached output. WHILE running in the canonical docs-only repo (bootstrap_ready=false), web-deploy and env-validation jobs SHALL skip without failing CI.
acceptanceHighlights: Given deploy edilmis web host, When /login deep-link istenir, Then index.html HTTP 200 doner (404 degil).
Given eksik zorunlu env, When build calisir, Then ihlal eden degisken adi raporlanir ve build abort edilir.
Given EAS deploy, When on-kosul kontrolu calisir, Then babel/metro/asset varligi dogrulanir (yoksa net hata).

specCandidates.title: Enforcement-first kalite: lint gate sertlestirme + coverage threshold + E2E davranis testi + scaffolding/plugin self-test
scope: bp-rule severity gradyani: recommended.js'i flat-config uyumlu yap (gecersiz plugins:[...] array kaldir), eslint.config.js 19x'warn' override'i tek-kaynaktan yonet, kademeli warn->error (once ihlal sifirla)
CI lint gate: 29 generic error (24 any+4 console+1 undef) duzelt -> gercekten yesile getir, --max-warnings baseline (web 56/mobile 52/ui 38) -> ratchet ile 0

Coverage threshold: @vitest/coverage-v8 ekle (lockfile'da YOK, sert on-kosul), web vitest.config coverage bloku, glob-pattern per-package esik (auth/core yuksek), mobil jest coverageThreshold + src/test/setup.ts
E2E davranis donusumu: 13 'heading visible' testini form-fill->submit->toHaveURL davranisina cevir, ci.yml'e Playwright job ekle (su an CI'da HIC kosmuyor), deterministik MSW fixture uzerinden
eslint-plugin-bp self-test: 19 kural icin RuleTester valid/invalid matrisi (regex/AST regresyon kilidi), ast-helpers/token-whitelist birim test
Scaffolding/upstream-sync smoke (bats): create-project.sh --skip-install -> kalan 'boilerplate'/'@project' ara, upstream-sync drift mantigi
outOfScope: bp-rule'larin tum 'error'a tek seferde cikarilmasi (baseline-then-ratchet, CI kilitlemeden)
Gercek backend E2E (deterministik MSW fixture uzerinden, SPEC-API-001'e bagli)
Yeni feature testleri (mevcut kod kalite kapilarini kurar, SPEC'lerin kendi testleri ilgili SPEC'te)
bp-v* tag uretimi (SPEC-INFRA-DERIVE-001; upstream-sync bats testi tag stratejisine bagli)
earsHighlights: The system SHALL run ESLint with --max-warnings 0 in the CI lint job (via baseline-then-ratchet) so no warning-level violation can merge to main.

The system SHALL enforce coverage thresholds in every package shipping runtime code; IF coverage enforcement is requested THEN @vitest/coverage-v8 SHALL first be installed (currently absent from lockfile).

WHEN an E2E login test runs, the system SHALL fill credentials, submit the form and assert a post-login redirect via toHaveURL, NOT merely assert heading visibility; the system SHALL run Playwright E2E in CI as a dedicated job.
The system SHALL execute the eslint-plugin-bp RuleTester suite in CI; IF any bp-rule is set to error THEN recommended.js SHALL use valid flat-config syntax so the config loads.

WHEN create-project.sh completes a derivation, the verify phase SHALL scan src/ for residual identity literals (including deep-link prefixes) and exit non-zero if any remain. WHILE warn->error migration is in progress, the warning baseline SHALL only decrease, never increase.
acceptanceHighlights: Given CI lint job, When PR acilir, Then --max-warnings 0 (veya azalan baseline) ile warning-seviyesi ihlal merge'i engellenir.
Given E2E auth-flow, When login testi kosar, Then form doldurulur, submit edilir ve toHaveURL ile redirect assert edilir (heading-visible degil), Playwright CI'da kosar.
Given coverage run, When @vitest/coverage-v8 kurulu, Then olculen baseline'a gore esik uygulanir ve dusus CI'i kirar.

phaseMap.focus: Mevcut durumun durust haritasi ve cross-platform kararinin resmilestirilmesi (kod yazimi YOK). Kanit: babel/metro MISSING, 0 git tag, nativewind kurulu degil, createApiClient fan_in=0, AuthProvider mount edilmemis, 241 var(--color), 27 ekran web-only, .codex hardcoded path. Yol B karari + NativeWind erteleme gerekcesi yeni ADR/ADR-007 amendment ile sabitlenir.
Hicbir RN kodunun test edilemedigi bloker'lari kaldir + turetme yasam dongusunu calisir kil. Bu iki SPEC paralel (farkli dosya alanlari: apps/mobile config vs tooling/derive).

UI cross-platform (Yol B) + veri katmani + auth dilimini canlandir. SPEC-UI-001 ve SPEC-API-001 SPEC-MOBILE-001'e bagimli; SPEC-AUTH-001 her ikisinin contract'ina (primitive + /api/auth MSW handler) baglanir.
Yanictici-yesili kir: lint gate sertlestir, coverage threshold, E2E davranis testi, plugin/scaffolding self-test. Dikey dilimler hazir olunca anlamli (E2E gercek auth/api akisini dogrular).

Gercek web deploy + SPA fallback + env sema + EAS paritesi (SPEC-DEPLOY-001). Governance/metadata yuku makullestirme (SPEC-REFACTOR-GOV-001, P1, acik karara bagli) bu fazda degerlendirilir ama bu turda SPEC adayi olarak DIS BIRAKILDI — bkz openQuestions.

Tum dilimler + uretim hatti hazir olduktan sonra: ratchet esiklerini yukari cek, ADR-mevcut-kod celiskilerini kapat, governance/metadata yukunu (MoAI-ADK lazy-load karari dahil) bilincli sadelestir. Operasyonel SPEC bu turda uretilmedi; openQuestions'taki kararlara bagli.

tensionsResolved.tension: Cross-platform UI refactor'unun (SPEC-UI-001) calisan web'i bozma riski: 28 web sayfasi + Tailwind 4 stack'i react-native-web ile cakisabilir.
tensionsResolved.resolution: Yol B (platform-split .web.tsx/.native.tsx) secilerek web tarafi OLDUGU GIBI birakilir (Tailwind 4 + CSS variable korunur), sadece mobil tarafa .native.tsx eklenir. react-native-web (Yol A) acikca reddedilir (web=Tailwind cakismasi). Sifir web regresyon riski. eslint 'no-html-element-in-ui-package' kurali .web.tsx haric uygulanir, .types.ts paylasimi API drift'i engeller. Migration pilot-first kademeli (en yuksek fan_in primitive once).

tensionsResolved.tension: SPEC-MOBILE-001 (bootstrap) ile SPEC-UI-001 (ekran port) arasinda sert bagimlilik: bootstrap Metro'yu boot eder ama @project/ui web-only oldugu icin 27 ekran Hermes'te crash eder — bootstrap TEK BASINA calisan mobil uygulama URETMEZ.
tensionsResolved.resolution: Faz ayrimi + acceptance kriteri bolme: SPEC-MOBILE-001 'Metro basarili bundle + expo-doctor temiz + Hermes aktif' garanti eder (Faz 1), ama 'ekranlar crash etmeden render eder' kriterini SPEC-UI-001'e (Faz 2) devreder. SPEC-UI-001 dependsOn SPEC-MOBILE-001 ile zorunlu siralanir. Iki SPEC ayni fazda DEGIL — config olmadan hicbir RN kodu test edilemez.

tensionsResolved.tension: SPEC-API-001 ve SPEC-AUTH-001 ayni transport (createApiClient) + ayni env (VITE_API_BASE_URL) + ayni /api/auth/* contract'ini paylasir; cakisma/cift-implementasyon riski.
tensionsResolved.resolution: SPEC-API-001 ONCE: createApiClient'i canlandirir, MSW /api/auth/* handler'lari + transport saglar, checkSession return-shape contract'ini fixture'larla besler. SPEC-AUTH-001 SONRA (dependsOn SPEC-API-001): bu transport+handler uzerine AuthProvider/guard/form ekler, kendi backend endpoint'i implemente ETMEZ. Env semasi SPEC-DEPLOY-001'de sabitlenir, VITE_API_BASE_URL wire-up noktasi SPEC-API-001'e baglanir (cift-tanim yok).

tensionsResolved.tension: SPEC-AUTH-001 auth formlari cross-platform primitive'e (TextField/Button onChangeText) bagli, ama mobil LoginScreen.tsx:27 (e.target as any).value RN'de bozuk.
tensionsResolved.resolution: SPEC-AUTH-001 dependsOn SPEC-UI-001: primitive onChange/onChangeText sozlesmesi netlestikten sonra auth formlari cross-platform birlesir. Web auth formlari (FormScreen altin sablonu) primitive hazir olmasa da RHF ile baglanabilir; mobil auth wiring primitive port'unu bekler. Bu yuzden SPEC-AUTH-001 hem SPEC-API-001 hem SPEC-UI-001'e bagimli (Faz 2 sonu).

tensionsResolved.tension: SPEC-TEST-001 enforcement (no-raw-pressable, no-hardcoded-color 'error'e cikma) packages/ui RN refactoru ve 241 var(--color) temizligiyle cakisir — severity sertlestirme erken yapilirsa CI kilitlenir.
tensionsResolved.resolution: SPEC-TEST-001 dependsOn SPEC-UI-001 (+API+AUTH+INFRA): severity yukseltme dikey dilimler tamamlandiktan SONRA (Faz 3). Baseline-then-ratchet stratejisi: once mevcut warning baseline dondurulur, ihlal sifirlandikca kural kural 'error'e cikarilir. UI refactor 241 occurrence'i temizledikce no-hardcoded-color anlamli olur. CI asla tek seferde kilitlenmez.

tensionsResolved.tension: SPEC-INFRA-DERIVE-001, SPEC-DEPLOY-001 ve SPEC-TEST-001 ayni CI workflow dosyalarina (.github/workflows/ci.yml, scheduled-audit.yml, deploy.yml) dokunur — write-conflict riski.
tensionsResolved.resolution: Sirali yapilir, paralel degil: SPEC-INFRA-DERIVE-001 (Faz 1) release.yml + scheduled-audit grep fix; SPEC-TEST-001 (Faz 3) ci.yml lint/test/e2e job; SPEC-DEPLOY-001 (Faz 4) deploy.yml + ci.yml artifact. Ayni fazda iki SPEC ayni workflow dosyasina yazmaz. SPEC-DEPLOY-001 repo-mode (bootstrap_ready) guard'ini SPEC-INFRA pattern'inden miras alir.

openQuestions: Web deploy hedefi hangi host olsun? Vercel (CLI-mode, SPA-first ADR-001 ile en uyumlu, onerilen) / Netlify (_redirects en basit SPA fallback) / Cloudflare Pages (edge, ucuz) / placeholder-agnostik (host'u derived project secsin). Bu karar SPEC-DEPLOY-001'in vercel.json vs netlify.toml vs wrangler config secimini belirler.

MoAI-ADK iskeleti kalici mi yoksa lazy-load/arsiv mi? Kanit: .moai/specs MISSING (MoAI hic SPEC uretmemis), CLAUDE.md 672 satir %100 MoAI directive ama proje docs/ai-guardrails sistemiyle calisiyor. KULLANILACAKSA pilot SPEC ile kanitlanmali; KULLANILMAYACAKSA 47 moai-* skill lazy-load + CLAUDE.md proje-kimlik odakli yeniden yazilmali. Bu karar governance-metadata SPEC'inin (SPEC-REFACTOR-GOV-001) kapsamini ve onceligini belirler — bu turda SPEC adayi olarak dis birakildi.

Governance/metadata yuku makullestirme (8 domain guardrail >150 satir DOGRULANDI, CLAUDE.md guardrail paritesi yok, drift otomasyonu olu, .codex hardcoded path) ayri bir P1 SPEC mi (SPEC-REFACTOR-GOV-001) yoksa parcalari ilgili SPEC'lere mi dagitilsin? .codex path fix zaten SPEC-INFRA-DERIVE-001'e koyuldu; geri kalan (guardrail-budget, CLAUDE.md cekirdek, drift) hizi dogrudan uretmedigi icin Faz 4-5'e ertelendi. Onaylanirsa 8. SPEC olarak eklenir.

Cross-platform mobil ekran portunda 'kademeli migrate' mi yoksa 'altin sablon belirleyip toplu yeniden uret' mi? 27 ekranin cogu boilerplate iskelet (gercek is-mantigi yok); time-to-product hedefiyle toplu yeniden uretim daha hizli olabilir. SPEC-UI-001 scope'unu etkiler.

Auth BaaS adaptoru icin hangi genisletme noktalari dokumante edilsin? Sadece own-backend-cookie (canonical) + Clerk (first-party httpOnly, ADR-010 ile en uyumlu) mi, yoksa Supabase/Firebase iskeleti de mi? localStorage token modeli (ADR-010 8.1 ihlali) bilincli kabul mu edilsin? SPEC-AUTH-001 kapsamini etkiler.

Coverage threshold baslangic tabani ne olsun? Mevcut 7 web testi + 0 core/mobile testi var. Global dusuk taban (orn lines 30-40%) + autoUpdate ratchet mi, yoksa kritik paketler (auth/core) yuksek (80%) digerleri muaf mi? SPEC-TEST-001'in CI'i kilitlemeden baslamasi bu karara bagli.
